i: HAH (Hrvatska agencija za hranu / Croatian Food Agency) — food safety authority. AZTN (Agencija za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja) — competition authority. Croatia transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2022.
Podravka, Kraš — major Croatian food companies. Agrokor/Fortenova Group — the largest food and retail conglomerate in Southeast Europe.
HZZO (Hrvatski zavod za zdravstveno osiguranje) — Croatia's health insurance fund. Ministry of Health oversees nutrition policy.
Hrvatski sabor (Croatian Parliament) — unicameral, 151 members. Contact through sabor.hr. Croatia is an EU and Eurozone member.

HT.s: Fragile state ($25.2B BBP) — Western Hemisphere's poorest country. Landbouw op 15.9% BBP (coffee, mangoes, cocoa). Extreme ontbossing (2% forest cover remaining). Gang violence and political instability. Productie op 26.2% BBP (garment assembly).

sectors.w: Haiti's near-total ontbossing (98% forest loss) means any remaining agriculture operates on severely degraded land. The systeemafhankelijkheid is already partially broken — Haiti has experienced the endpoint of ontbossing-driven agricultural collapse. Reforestation is the intervention.
bp: Hervormen agricultural support to incentivize tree planting and agroforestry. Wanneer hillside farmers receive more support for tree crops (coffee, cocoa, fruit) than annual crops on degraded slopes, het overlappende belang in continued ontbossing breaks.
Satellite monitoring of remaining forest cover and soil erosion published at commune level. Making degradation visible makes W computable.

Extreme systeemafhankelijkheid — 98% forest loss means agricultural activity on degraded slopes directly causes erosion, flooding, and further land degradation. Reforestation is the only path to reducing systeemafhankelijkheid.
a: Document ontbossing through community organizations
Report illegal charcoal production to MDE (Ministry of Environment)
Engage international development organizations
International agricultural companies: Support sustainable supply chains from Haiti
Investeren in tree crop processing (coffee, cacao, mango)

Support Haitian diaspora organizations working on milieu- restoration
i: MDE (Ministère de l'Environnement) — the environment ministry, severely under-resourced. Note: Haiti's state institutions are largely non-functional due to the ongoing security and governance crisis. International organizations (UN, USAID, EU) provide most milieu- programming.
Haiti's private sector is small. The Chambre de Commerce d'Haïti coordinates business activities. International NGOs (Partners in Health, Trees for the Future) implement many development programs.

MARNDR (Ministère de l'Agriculture, des Ressources Naturelles et du Développement Rural) — the agriculture ministry. ONEV (Observatoire National de l'Environnement et de la Vulnérabilité) — milieu- monitoring.

Note: Haiti's democratic institutions are non-functional — no elected parliament since 2023, no elected president. Transitional governance is underway. International channels: UN Integrated Office in Haiti (BINUH), CARICOM, OAS, Haitian diaspora organizations.

HU.s: EU-lid ($222.7B BBP) with strong manufacturing (15.8% BBP, automotive-focused). Diensten op 59.5% BBP. Small oil and gas sector (MOL Group). Landbouw op 2.7% BBP. Democratic backsliding under Orbán government has strained EU relations.

sectors.w: Hungary has one of Europe's highest obesity rates and introduced a 'chip tax' (NETA — népegészségügyi termékadó) on UPF in 2011. Wanneer health insurance data (NEAK) links diet to healthcare costs per product category, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Versterken the NETA tax and extend to broader UPF categories. Hungary's pioneering public health product tax verzwakt het overlappende belang in high-margin UPF by internalizing health costs.
NEAK publication of diet-attributable healthcare expenditure. Hungary's health insurance system generates data to make W computable.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. Hervormenulation targets can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

Document food safety violations

i: NÉBIH (Nemzeti Élelmiszerlánc-biztonsági Hivatal) — Hungary's food chain safety authority. GVH (Gazdasági Versenyhivatal) — competition authority enforcing fair advertising. Hungary transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive.
Major companies: Bonafarm Group, Pick Szeged. International companies operating in Hungary: Nestlé, Coca-Cola, PepsiCo.

NETA (népegészségügyi termékadó) — Hungary's public health product tax, one of the world's first UPF taxes, introduced 2011. NEAK (Nemzeti Egészségbiztosítási Alapkezelő) — national health insurance fund.
Országgyűlés (National Assembly of Hungary) — unicameral parliament, 199 members. Contact through parlament.hu.

ID.s: G20 economie ($1,396.3B BBP). World's largest palm oil producer (palm oil=~3.5% BBP). Significant coal (1.22% rents), oil/gas (1.61%), and mijnbouw (1.91%). Massive archipelago with extraordinary biodiversity. Palm oil expansion has driven catastrophic ontbossing.

sectors.w: Indonesia produces ~60% of global palm oil. EUDR compliance will require zero-ontbossing traceability to plantation level. Wanneer per installatieation forest loss data is linked to palm oil transactions, W wordt berekenbaar from commodity prices.
bp: EUDR compliance forcing zero-ontbossing supply chain traceability. Wanneer international buyers require verified ontbossing-free palm oil, het overlappende belang in clearing forest for new plantations breaks — productivity improvement on existing land becomes the viable model.

Mandatory per-concession milieu- data (fire occurrence, peat depth, biodiversity surveys) linked to ISPO certification. Indonesia's KLHK already monitors ontbossing by satellite — publishing per-company data makes W computable.

Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Palm oil monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. However, smallholder agroforestry and yield improvement on existing plantations can reduce pressure for new forest conversion.

Pleiten via ASEAN for regional zero-ontbossing commitments
Aandringen op international tropical forest conservation finance
i: KLHK (Kementerian Lingkungan Hidup dan Kehutanan) — the environment and forestry ministry, responsible for forest management, milieu- regulation, and fire prevention. Komnas HAM (Komisi Nasional Hak Asasi Manusia) — the national human rights commission. WALHI (Wahana Lingkungan Hidup Indonesia / Friends of the Earth Indonesia) — the largest milieu- NGO.

Wilmar International — the world's largest palm oil trader. Golden Agri-Resources (Sinar Mas Group) — one of the largest palm oil producers. GAPKI (Gabungan Pengusaha Kelapa Sawit Indonesia) — the Indonesian palm oil association. RSPO and ISPO (Indonesian Sustainable Palmolie) — certification standards.

One Map Policy (Kebijakan Satu Peta) — Indonesia's initiative to create a single, authoritative map of land use and forest cover to resolve overlapping concessions. BPDPKS (Badan Pengelola Dana Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit) — the palm oil plantation fund managing the CPO export levy.

DPR (Dewan Perwakilan Rakyat / People's Representative Council) — lower house, 580 members. DPD (Dewan Perwakilan Daerah / Regional Representative Council) — upper house, 136 members. Contact through dpr.go.id. Indonesia is a presidential democratie and the world's third-largest democratie.

IE.s: High-income EU economie ($609.2B BBP, inflated by multinational profit booking). Productie op 29.6% BBP (pharma, tech). Major corporate tax hub. Landbouw op 1% BBP but intensive dairy farming with significant methane emissies. Diensten op 60.6% BBP.

sectors.w: Ireland's dairy herd expansion post-milk-quota-abolition (2015) increased methane emissies by 20%+. Wanneer per-farm greenhouse gas data is published alongside output, W wordt berekenbaar from agricultural production data.
bp: Hervormen CAP subsidies from production-linked to milieu- outcome-linked. Wanneer dairy expansion no longer receives per-cow support, het overlappende belang in herd growth verzwakt.
Mandatory per-farm greenhouse gas balance disclosure. Ireland's Bord Bia Origin Green program collects data — making it publicly verifiable makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Ruminant digestion produces methane by biological process. Feed additives (e.g., 3-NOP) can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane.

Document water pollution from dairy — report to local authority water services
Use Irish Protected Disclosures Act 2014 for protected reporting
Kerry Group, Glanbia, Ornua: Set binding methane reduction targets

EPA: Versterken agricultural emissies monitoring
Bord Bia: Make Origin Green data independently verifiable

Support stronger EU CAP conditionality on methane
Advocate for inclusion of agricultural methane in EU ETS
Aandringen op Ireland's Climate Action Plan sectoral emissies ceilings to be enforced
i: EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) — Ireland's milieu- regulator. Protected Disclosures Act 2014 (amended 2022) — Ireland's klokkenluider protection law, one of the strongest in Europe.

Kerry Group — major food ingredients company. Glanbia — dairy and nutrition company. Ornua (formerly Irish Dairy Board) — manages Kerrygold brand. Teagasc — the agriculture and food development authority providing research and extension.
DAFM (Department of Agriculture, Food and the Marine) — Ireland's agriculture ministry. Bord Bia (Irish Food Board) — the food marketing agency running the Origin Green sustainability program.

Oireachtas (Parliament of Ireland) — bicameral: Dáil Éireann (160 TDs) and Seanad Éireann (60 Senators). Contact through oireachtas.ie. Ireland's Climate Action and Low Carbon Ontwikkelenment Act (2021) sets legally binding emissies budgets.

IL.s: High-tech economie ($540.4B BBP) with dominant services (72.5% BBP). High military expenditure (8.78% BBP). Gas production from Leviathan and Tamar fields (0.43% gas rents). Major tech sector — 'Startup Nation.' Water management leader (desalination, drip irrigation).

sectors.w: Israel's Mediterranean gas fields (Leviathan, Tamar) were discovered in 2009-2010. Per-field emissies disclosure through ISA (Israel Securities Authority) listed company requirements makes W computable from production data.
bp: Export gas to replace coal in Egypt and Jordan — net emissies benefit if displacing higher-carbon sources. But this locks in gas infrastructure. Wanneer renewable alternatives become cheaper for regional electricity, the overlappend belang verzwakt.
Mandatory per veld emissies disclosure for Leviathan and Tamar operators. ISA reporting requirements provide the mechanism to make W computable.
Niet breekbaar by policy alone. Gas combustion releases CO₂.

Electricity Authority: Accelerate hernieuwbare energie targets (Israel aims for 30% renewable by 2030)
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Versterken offshore milieu- standards

Support regional energy cooperation through the Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum (EMGF)
Advocate for Abraham Accords normalization to include hernieuwbare energie cooperation with Gulf states
Aandringen op OECD milieu- performance review recommendations implementation
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — Israel's milieuautoriteit. ISA (Israel Securities Authority) — regulates disclosure for listed companies including Delek Group. Israel has klokkenluider protections under the Protection of Workers (Exposure of Offenses) Law, 1997.
NewMed Energy — operates Leviathan field. Chevron — acquired Noble Energy's interest in Tamar. Israel Natural Gas Lines (INGL) — the staatsbedrijf gas transmission company.

Petroleum Commissioner — within the Ministry of Energy, oversees oil and gas licensing. Electricity Authority — the independent electricity regulator. Israel's Electricity Market Hervormen aims to increase competition and renewable penetration.

Knesset (כנסת) — Israel's unicameral parliament, 120 members. Contact through knesset.gov.il. Israel is an OECD member. EMGF (Eastern Mediterranean Gas Forum) — regional organization for gas market coordination.

IQ.s: Oil-dependent economie ($279.6B BBP) with 43.45% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. OPEC member producing ~4.5M bpd. Massive gas flaring (Iraq flares more gas than almost any other country). Post-conflict reconstruction ongoing.

sectors.w: Iraq flares $2.5B+ worth of associated gas annually. Capturing and monetizing flared gas makes W computable — the flared gas represents pure waste visible from satellite (World Bank GGFR data).
bp: Gas capture and monetization. Iraq wastes $2.5B/year in flared gas. Wanneer gas capture infrastructure is built, het overlappende belang in flaring (which is cheaper short-term than processing) breaks as captured gas generates revenue.
Satellite-based flare monitoring (VIIRS nightfire data) already makes gas flaring volumes visible globally. Linking per veld flaring data to production revenue makes W computable.
Niet breekbaar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Document gas flaring volumes — satellite data from World Bank GGFR provides independent verification
Report through Iraq EITI channels

Implementeren flare reduction targets

Ministry of Environment: Versterken air quality enforcement near oil fields

Support World Bank GGFR zero routine flaring by 2030 initiative for Iraq

Support UN Iraq partnership on milieu- governance capacity building
i: Note: Iraq's institutional capacity for milieu- regulation is limited. The Ministry of Oil oversees petroleum operations. EITI Iraq — Iraq has been EITI compliant since 2012. World Bank Global Gas Flaring Reduction Partnership (GGFR) — monitors and reports on global gas flaring using satellite data.

BP operates Rumaila (Iraq's largest field). TotalEnergies has the $27B Gas Growth Integrated Project (GGIP) to capture associated gas. ExxonMobil, Lukoil, PetroChina — other major operators. Basra Oil Company — manages southern oil fields.

Ministry of Oil — oversees all petroleum operations and manages Technical Service Contracts (TSCs) with international operators. Ministry of Environment — responsible for milieu- policy but severely under-resourced.

Note: Iraq is a parlementair democratie but governance is fragmented among sectarian and ethnic power blocs. Council of Representatives (Majlis al-Nuwab, 329 members). International channels: OPEC membership, World Bank, UNAMI (UN Assistance Mission for Iraq), GGFR.

IR.s: Major oil and gas producer ($475.3B BBP) with 27.08% combined rents. World's second-largest natural gas reserves (after Russia). Under comprehensive international sancties. Productie op 20.6% BBP. Theocratic governance limits civic channels.

sectors.w: International sancties have already weakened the overlappend belang by restricting Iran's ability to monetize oil exports at market price. Wanneer sancties enforcement eliminates the discount market, Iran's economic model requires diversification.
bp: Sanctions enforcement. Wanneer Iran cannot sell oil at market prices, the economic case for hernieuwbare energie investment (Iran has excellent solar potential) strengthens. The overlappend belang in oil dependence breaks when export revenues are structurally constrained.
Per-field milieu- data is largely unavailable due to sancties-related opacity. International satellite monitoring (methane detection) provides external data to estimate W.
Niet breekbaar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

Document air pollution and health impacts — Iran's cities rank among the world's most polluted
Report through international academic and research channels

DoE: Versterken air quality enforcement in Tehran and major cities
Ministry of Energy: Accelerate hernieuwbare energie development
Support international climate cooperation mechanisms that include Iran

Aandringen op milieu- conditionality in any future sancties relief negotiations
Support Iranian diaspora milieu- advocacy organizations
i: DoE (سازمان حفاظت محیط زیست / Department of Environment) — Iran's milieuautoriteit, which has limited enforcement power. NIOC (National Iranian Oil Company) — the state oil company. Note: Iran has no effective klokkenluider protection. Civil society is severely constrained.

NIOC — controls all upstream oil and gas operations. NIGC (National Iranian Gas Company) — manages gas production and distribution. Pars Oil and Gas Company — manages South Pars/North Dome gas field operations.

Ministry of Petroleum — oversees oil and gas policy. Iran's Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Organization (SATBA) — responsible for hernieuwbare energie development. Iran has installed some solar and wind capacity but it remains a tiny fraction of energy supply.

Note: Iran is a theocratic republic. The Islamic Consultative Assembly (Majles, 290 members) has limited power relative to the Supreme Leader and Guardian Council. International channels: OPEC, UNFCCC (Iran signed but did not ratify Paris Agreement), UN Environment Programme.

IS.s: Small advanced economie ($33.3B BBP) with 100% renewable electricity (geothermal and hydro). Visserij are 5% of BBP and the largest PST exposure — Iceland's fisheries management is globally studied but faces sustainability challenges from ocean warming.

sectors.w: Iceland's ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system generates detailed per-vessel catch data. Wanneer ecosystem health metrics (stock assessments, bycatch, seabed impact) are published alongside fishing revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Hervormen ITQ allocations to include ecosystem impact costs. Wanneer quota holders pay for bycatch and seabed damage, het overlappende belang in maximum extraction verzwakt.
Publish per-vessel ecosystem impact data alongside catch revenue. Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute already conducts stock assessments — linking to economic data makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Fishing inherently removes biomass from marine ecosystems. However, science-based quota management can keep extraction within sustainable yield limits.
a: Report quota violations to Fiskistofa (Directorate of Visserij)
Document bycatch or illegal discarding
Use Iceland's klokkenluider protections
Samherji, Íslandsbanki: Aannemen sustainability-linked targets for fishing operations
Implementeren per-vessel bycatch reduction technology

i: Fiskistofa (Directorate of Visserij) — responsible for fisheries management, quota enforcement, and monitoring. Hafrannsóknastofnun (Marine and Freshwater Research Institute) — conducts stock assessments and marine research.

Samherji — Iceland's largest fishing company. Brim, HB Grandi — other major fishing companies. SFS (Samtök fyrirtækja í sjávarútvegi / Federation of Icelandic Fishing Vessel Owners) — the industry association.

Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Visserij — oversees fisheries policy. The ITQ (Individual Transferable Quota) system — Iceland's fisheries management system, one of the world's most studied, allocating catch shares that can be traded.

Alþingi (Althing) — Iceland's unicameral parliament, 63 members, one of the world's oldest legislatures (established 930 CE). Contact through althingi.is. NEAFC — the regional fisheries management organization for the Northeast Atlantic.

JG.s: British Crown Dependencies ($12.5B BBP) — Jersey and Guernsey. Major offshore financial centers (91.2% services). Financial services dominate with significant fund administration and trust structures. Not part of the UK or EU but closely aligned with UK regulatory standards.

sectors.w: Channel Islands' financial services facilitate global capital flows with lower transparantie than UK mainland. Wanneer beneficial ownership data and tax transparantie information are published, W wordt berekenbaar from financial intermediation data.
bp: Full beneficial ownership transparantie aligned with UK Economic Crime Act requirements. Wanneer financial secrecy is eliminated, the overlappend belang between service providers and opacity-seeking clients verzwakt.
Mandatory CRS (Common Reporting Standard) enhanced reporting. Publishing aggregate capital flow data makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Financial intermediation can relocate but the Channel Islands' proximity to London and established legal infrastructure create switching costs.

i: JFSC (Jersey Financiële Diensten Commission) — Jersey's financial regulator. GFSC (Guernsey Financiële Diensten Commission) — Guernsey's financial regulator. JFIU / FIS — financial intelligence units.
Channel Islands host operations of major international banks and fund administrators. Jersey Finance and Guernsey Finance promote the financial services sectors.
JFSC — Jersey's integrated financial regulator. GFSC — Guernsey's equivalent. Both crown dependencies have their own regulatory frameworks but coordinate closely with UK authorities.

States of Jersey (49 members) and States of Guernsey (38 members) — the insular legislatures. Constitutional relationship with UK means UK Parliament can legislate for the Crown Dependencies on international obligations.

JM.s: Caribbean island economie ($22B BBP) with tourism and services dominant (60% BBP). Landbouw op 8% BBP. Bauxite/alumina industry historically significant but declining. Climate-vulnerable. High debt burden (IMF structural adjustment).

sectors.w: Jamaica's agricultural sector is dominated by sugar and banana monoculture on degraded soils. Wanneer soil health and watershed degradation data is published alongside agricultural output, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Hervormen agricultural subsidies toward crop diversification and agroforestry. Wanneer farmers receive support for diverse crops rather than monoculture sugar, the overlappend belang breaks.
Publish watershed health and soil erosion data linked to agricultural practices. NEPA collects milieu- data — linking to farming output makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Tropical monoculture inherently degrades soil. Jamaica's Blue Mountain coffee model shows premium diversification is viable.

i: NEPA (National Environment and Planning Agency) — Jamaica's milieuautoriteit. RADA — provides agricultural extension services.
Sugar Industry Authority — regulates Jamaica's sugar sector. Jamaica Producers Group — diversified agricultural company.
Ministry of Agriculture and Visserij — oversees agricultural policy. SIA — regulates the sugar industry.
Parliament of Jamaica — bicameral: House of Representatives (63 members) and Senate (21 appointed). Jamaica is a Westminster-style parlementair democratie.

JO.s: Water-scarce Middle Eastern economie ($53.4B BBP) with limited natural resources. Diensten op 60.4% BBP. High military expenditure (4.8% BBP). Productie op 17.7% (phosphate, potash, pharmaceuticals). Among the world's most water-stressed countries.

sectors.w: Jordan's phosphate and potash mijnbouw (Arab Potash Company, Jordan Phosphate Mines Company) depletes Dead Sea water levels and contaminates groundwater. Wanneer milieu- cost data is published alongside mijnbouw revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Internalize milieu- costs (Dead Sea decline, water depletion) into mijnbouw operations through milieu- levies. Wanneer miners pay for water extraction in one of Earth's most water-stressed countries, het overlappende belang in water-intensive extraction verzwakt.
Publish per mijn water consumption and Dead Sea level impact data. Jordan's water authority collects data — linking to mijnbouw output makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining inherently uses water. However, water recycling and dry processing can reduce per-ton water consumption.

i: Ministry of Environment — Jordan's milieuautoriteit. WAJ (Water Authority of Jordan) — manages the country's severely limited water resources. Jordan has approximately 60 cubic meters of renewable water per capita — far below the 500 m³ threshold for absolute water scarcity.
JPMC — one of the world's largest phosphate producers. APC (Arab Potash Company) — extracts potash from the Dead Sea.
Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources — oversees mijnbouw policy. NRA (Natural Resources Authority) — the mijnbouw regulatory body.

Majlis al-Umma (Parliament of Jordan) — bicameral: Majlis al-Nuwab (House of Representatives, 130 members, elected) and Majlis al-Ayan (Senate, 65 appointed). Jordan is a constitutionele monarchie with limited democratic space.

KE.s: East Africa's largest economie ($120.3B BBP) with agriculture at 22.5% BBP (tea, coffee, horticulture). Diensten op 55.3%. 90%+ renewable electricity (geothermal, hydro). Vibrant tech sector (M-Pesa). Wildlife tourism. Climate-vulnerable (drought cycles).

sectors.w: Kenya's tea and horticulture sectors use intensive farming on shrinking arable land. Wanneer per-farm water and pesticide data is published alongside export revenue, W wordt berekenbaar. Kenya's M-Pesa infrastructure enables farm-level data collection.
bp: Hervormen agricultural export incentives to require milieu- certification. Wanneer tea and flower exports must demonstrate sustainable water and pesticide use, het overlappende belang in intensive monoculture verzwakt.
Farm-level milieu- data collection using mobile technology (Kenya's digital infrastructure is advanced). Making water and chemical use visible per farm makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Intensive horticulture inherently affects water and soil systems. However, Kenya's organic agriculture sector is growing and agroforestry can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

i: NEMA (National Environment Management Authority) — Kenya's milieu- regulator, responsible for milieu- impact assessments, pollution control, and enforcement. WRA (Water Resources Authority) — manages water resources allocation and monitoring. PCPB (Pest Control Products Board) — regulates pesticide registration and use.

KTDA — manages tea production for ~600,000 smallholder farmers. KFC (Kenya Flower Council) — the self-regulatory body for the cut flower industry. Unilever (Lipton/Ekaterra) — major buyer of Kenyan tea.
Ministry of Agriculture, Livestock, Visserij and Cooperatives — oversees agricultural policy. AFA — regulates agricultural commodities including tea, coffee, and horticultural products.

Parliament of Kenya — bicameral: National Assembly (349 members) and Senate (67 members). Contact through parliament.go.ke. Kenya's 2010 Constitution includes strong milieu- protection provisions (Article 42 — right to a clean and healthy environment).

KG.s: Small mountainous economie ($17.5B BBP) dominated by gold mijnbouw (Kumtor mine = 10%+ of BBP, min=11.15%). Landbouw op 8.6% BBP. Remittances from Russia significant. Parliamentary democratie (rare in Central Asia).

sectors.w: Kumtor gold mine (Centerra Gold, now nationalized) operates near glaciers — tailings and cyanide contamination affect water systems. Wanneer milieu- monitoring data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Environmental bonds and community benefit agreements for all mijnbouw. Wanneer remediation costs are internalized, marginal mines become unprofitable.
Per-mine water quality and glacier impact monitoring published openly. Making milieu- costs visible makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining at high altitude inherently affects glacial systems. Improved tailings management can reduce impact.

Kyrgyzaltyn — manages state mijnbouw interests. EITI Kyrgyz Republic — member since 2004.
State Committee for Industry, Energy and Subsoil Use — mijnbouw regulator.
Jogorku Kenesh (Supreme Council) — unicameral parliament, 90 members. Kyrgyzstan is Central Asia's most democratic country.

KH.s: Lower-middle-income economie ($46.4B BBP) with garment manufacturing (27.8% BBP) and agriculture (16.6%). Mekong Delta ontbossing ongoing. Authoritarian governance under Hun Manet (succeeded Hun Sen in 2023).

sectors.w: Cambodia lost 25%+ of tree cover since 2000 — economic land concessions for rubber and sugar monoculture are primary drivers. Satellite monitoring makes ontbossing computable.
bp: Hervormen economic land concession system to require milieu- compliance. Wanneer concession holders face revocation for ontbossing, the overlappend belang verzwakt.
Satellite-based forest monitoring (Global Forest Watch already tracks Cambodia extensively) linked to concession data makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. Community-managed forests demonstrate alternative models.

i: Note: Cambodia under CPP governance severely restricts maatschappelijk middenveld. LICADHO (Cambodian League for the Promotion and Defence of Human Rights) — one of the few remaining domestic human rights organizations. Global Witness has documented illegal logging and land concession abuses.

Major economic land concessions are held by politically connected companies and foreign investors (Chinese, Vietnamese, Thai companies). The garment sector (H&M, Gap supply chains) has milieu- certification requirements.

Ministry of Agriculture, Forestry and Visserij — oversees agricultural and forestry policy. Ministry of Environment — manages protected areas. Sub-Decree 146 on Economic Land Concessions governs the ELC system.

Note: Cambodia's National Assembly (125 members) is dominated by the CPP. The Senate (62 members) is similarly controlled. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, EU EBA trade preferences (EU has partially withdrawn preferences citing human rights concerns).

KW.s: Wealthy petrostate ($160.2B BBP) with 29.28% combined oil and gas rents. Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC) manages all oil operations. Kuwait Investment Authority (KIA) is one of the world's oldest sovereign wealth funds. Constitutional monarchy with elected parliament.

sectors.w: Kuwait's Burgan oil field (world's second-largest) is mature. As production costs rise, the overlappend belang verzwakt. KIA sovereign wealth provides a diversification mechanism.
bp: KIA investment diversification away from fossil fuels. Wanneer the sovereign wealth fund's returns from non-oil investments exceed declining oil returns, het overlappende belang in oil dependence breaks.
Per-field emissies disclosure for KPC operations. Making milieu- costs visible makes W computable.
Niet breekbaar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: EPA Kuwait (Environment Public Authority) — the milieu- regulator. KPC (Kuwait Petroleum Corporation) — the state oil company managing all upstream and downstream operations. State Audit Bureau — conducts financial oversight.
KPC — manages Kuwait's entire petroleum value chain. KIA (Kuwait Investment Authority) — sovereign wealth fund, one of the world's largest.
Supreme Petroleum Council — the supreme decision-making body for oil policy. CBK (Central Bank of Kuwait) — the financial regulator.

Majlis al-Umma (National Assembly) — 50 elected members, one of the most active parliaments in the Gulf. Kuwait is a constitutionele monarchie with genuine (if limited) parlementair debate on oil policy.

KZ.s: Central Asia's largest economie ($291.5B BBP) with massive oil (14.84%) and gas (2.04%) rents. Tengiz, Kashagan, and Karachaganak are mega-fields. Mining at 9.1% (uranium — world's largest producer, copper, gold). Coal at 0.85%. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Kazakhstan's Kashagan field has suffered repeated delays and milieu- incidents (H₂S — hydrogen sulfide). Environmental monitoring of H₂S emissies and Caspian Sea impact makes W computable from production data.
bp: Redirect National Fund (sovereign wealth) investment toward economic diversification. Wanneer non-oil sectors grow faster than depleting oil revenue, het overlappende belang in continued extraction breaks.
Per-field emissies and milieu- monitoring disclosure (particularly H₂S at Kashagan). Making milieu- and health costs visible makes W computable.
Niet breekbaar. Hydrocarbon extraction and combustion release CO₂ and H₂S.

i: Ministry of Ecology and Natural Resources — milieuautoriteit. KazMunayGas — the national oil company. EITI Kazakhstan — member since 2007. Note: Civil society space is severely constrained.

NCOC (North Caspian Operating Company) — manages Kashagan (Shell, TotalEnergies, Eni, ExxonMobil, KMG, CNPC, Inpex). TCO (Tengizchevroil) — manages Tengiz (Chevron 50%, ExxonMobil 25%, KMG 20%, Lukoil 5%).

Ministry of Energy — oversees oil, gas, and energy policy. Samruk-Kazyna — the national wealth fund holding state shares in KazMunayGas and other state enterprises. National Fund of the Republic of Kazakhstan — the sovereign wealth fund (managed by the National Bank) with $55B+ in assets.

Note: Kazakhstan under President Tokayev is rated 'Not Free.' The Mazhilis (lower house, 107 members) and Senate (50 members) do not function independently. International channels: EITI, Tehran Convention (Caspian milieu- cooperation), SCO (Shanghai Cooperation Organisation), OSCE.

LA.s: Landlocked Southeast Asian economie ($16.5B BBP) with agriculture at 16.8% BBP and mijnbouw at 3.89%. Major hydropower producer (dam exports to Thailand). One-party state. Severe debt crisis ($13B+ external debt, primarily to China).

sectors.w: Laos's mijnbouw sector (gold, copper, potash) generates water contamination and community displacement. Wanneer milieu- monitoring data is published alongside mijnbouw revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Environmental bonds for mijnbouw licenses. Wanneer remediation costs are pre-funded, marginal operations become uneconomic.
Per-mine milieu- data disclosure through international operator reporting. Making milieu- costs visible makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining disturbs landscapes but improved management can reduce impact.

Ministry of Energy and Mines — oversees mijnbouw and energy policy. Laos is not yet an EITI member.
Note: National Assembly (164 members) is controlled by LPRP. International channels: ASEAN, Mekong River Commission, Asian Ontwikkelenment Bank, World Bank.

LB.s: Collapsed economie ($20.1B BBP, down from $55B in 2018). Banking sector crisis wiped out savings. Services historically dominated. Political system based on sectarian power-sharing (confessionalism). Multiple concurrent crises — economic, political, refugee.

sectors.w: Lebanon's banking sector collapse (2019-present) represents a PST endgame — the overlappend belang has already partially broken through crisis. The remaining PST is in the lack of accountability for banking sector losses.
bp: Banking sector restructuring with full forensic audit of capital outflows. Wanneer accountability is established for the $72B+ in depositor losses, the overlappend belang between banks, politicians, and central bank in opacity breaks.
Publication of forensic audit results (Alvarez & Marsal was contracted but access was blocked). Making the flow of funds visible makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar — the crisis has already revealed systeemafhankelijkheid. But without institutional reform, the same dynamics can rebuild.

i: SIC (Special Investigation Commission) — Lebanon's financial intelligence unit. BDL (Banque du Liban / Central Bank) — the central bank whose financial engineering scheme is at the center of the crisis. Note: Lebanon has some of the region's strongest press freedom.
ABL (Association of Banks in Lebanon) — represents 60+ banks. BDL — the central bank. Lebanon's banking sector losses are estimated at $72B+.
Banking Control Commission — the banking supervisor. IMF — Lebanon reached a staff-level agreement in 2022 but reforms remain unimplemented.

Note: Lebanon's parliament (128 members, elected on confessional basis) is functional but deeply divided. The political system is paralyzed by sectarian power-sharing. International channels: IMF, World Bank, CEDRE conference donors, French-led international support group.

LK.s: Island economie ($99B BBP) recovering from 2022 economic crisis. Landbouw op 8.3% BBP (tea, rubber, coconut). Productie op 17.6% (garments). Tourism significant. Post-crisis IMF program. Historically one of Asia's highest human development indicators.

sectors.w: Sri Lanka's 2021 overnight organic farming mandate (banning chemical fertilizers) demonstrated how agricultural systeemafhankelijkheid works — it caused immediate crop failure. The lesson: gradual transition with data makes W computable.
bp: Gradual agricultural transition with per-farm soil health monitoring (learning from the 2021 failure). Wanneer transition is evidence-based rather than ideological, het overlappende belang in chemical-dependent monoculture verzwakt sustainably.
Per-estate milieu- data for tea, rubber, and coconut published alongside export revenue. Sri Lanka's Tea Research Institute collects data — making it public makes W computable.

Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Sri Lanka's 2021 experiment showed both the reality of systeemafhankelijkheid (sudden decoupling fails) and its reducibility (gradual transition with soil biology rebuilding works).

Ministry of Agriculture — oversees agricultural policy. Sri Lanka Tea Board — manages quality standards and exports.

Parliament of Sri Lanka (225 members). Contact through parliament.lk. Sri Lanka is a semi-presidential republic. EU GSP+ — Sri Lanka benefits from preferential trade access contingent on human rights and milieu- governance.

LT.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($84.9B BBP). Diensten op 63.6% BBP. Productie op 14% BBP. Achieved energy independence from Russian gas (Klaipėda LNG terminal). Landbouw op 2.6% BBP.

LU.s: Major EU financial center ($93.3B BBP, highest BBP per capita globally). Diensten op 81.2% BBP. World's second-largest investment fund domicile (after US). EU institutions host. Steel industry legacy (ArcelorMittal).

Chambre des Députés — unicameral parliament, 60 members. Contact through chd.lu. Luxembourg was instrumental in establishing the EU Green Bond Standard and hosts the Luxembourg Green Exchange.

LV.s: Baltic EU and Eurozone member ($43.7B BBP). Diensten op 64.6% BBP. Forestry significant. Landbouw op 4% BBP. Post-Soviet economic transformation. NATO member.

LY.s: Oil-dependent fragile state ($48.5B BBP) with 60.96% combined oil and gas rents — one of the world's highest. NOC (National Oil Corporation) manages production (~1.2M bpd when not disrupted). Divided governance (Tripoli vs. eastern-based authorities). Ongoing instability since 2011.

sectors.w: Libya's oil production is repeatedly disrupted by factional conflict (fields and export terminals seized as bargaining chips). The overlappend belang is already partially broken by instability — production is not reliably monetizable.
bp: Governance reform that depoliticizes oil revenue distribution. Wanneer oil revenue is managed through transparent, rules-based mechanisms (rather than factional control), het overlappende belang in capturing oil infrastructure verzwakt.
NOC per veld production and revenue data disclosure. The Libyan Audit Bureau provides some oversight — extending to milieu- data makes W computable.
Niet breekbaar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: NOC (National Oil Corporation) — manages Libya's oil sector. Libyan Audit Bureau — provides financial oversight. UN Panel of Experts on Libya — monitors sancties compliance and resource governance.
NOC — the national oil company operating most production. Eni, TotalEnergies, Repsol, ConocoPhillips — major international operators.
CBL (Central Bank of Libya) — manages oil revenue. The division of the CBL between Tripoli and eastern-based institutions has complicated revenue management.

Note: Libya has no functioning unified government or elected legislature. The House of Representatives (Tobruk) and High Council of State (Tripoli) are rival bodies. International channels: UN Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL), African Union, Arab League.

MA.s: North African economie ($160.6B BBP) with agriculture at 10.6% BBP and growing hernieuwbare energie sector (Noor-Ouarzazate solar complex). Major phosphate producer (OCP Group — world's largest). Productie op 15.3% BBP.

sectors.w: Morocco controls 70%+ of global phosphate reserves (OCP Group). Phosphate mijnbouw generates cadmium-contaminated waste and depletes water in arid regions. Wanneer per mijn milieu- data is published alongside production revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Internalize water and cadmium remediation costs into phosphate pricing. Wanneer OCP pays for water depletion in already water-stressed regions, het overlappende belang in low-cost extraction verzwakt.

Mandatory per mijn milieu- disclosure (water use, cadmium levels, waste volumes). OCP already publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verifiable per mijn data makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Phosphate rock inherently contains cadmium. However, cadmium removal technologies exist and can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

OCP Group (Office Chérifien des Phosphates) — staatsbedrijf, controls ~30% of global phosphate trade. OCP has invested heavily in sustainability initiatives including the Mohammed VI Polytechnic University.
Ministry of Energy, Mines and Environment — oversees mijnbouw and milieu- policy. ONEE — manages water supply infrastructure.
Parlement du Maroc — bicameral: Chambre des Représentants (395 members) and Chambre des Conseillers (120 members). Morocco is a constitutionele monarchie with an elected parliament.

MC.s: City-state ($11.1B BBP) with 87.2% services. Major financial center and tourism hub. No income tax for individuals. World's highest BBP per capita and population density. Limited PST exposure except through financial intermediation.

sectors.w: Monaco's financial services facilitate wealth management with favorable tax treatment. Wanneer beneficial ownership and tax transparantie data are published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Full compliance with OECD Global Forum transparantie standards and CRS information exchange. Wanneer opacity is eliminated, the overlappend belang verzwakt.
Publication of aggregate beneficial ownership and capital flow data. Maakt W berekenbaar.

Conseil National — Monaco's unicameral parliament, 24 members. Monaco is a constitutionele monarchie (Prince Albert II). Moneyval (Council of Europe) evaluates Monaco's AML framework.

MD.s: Small Eastern European economie ($18.2B BBP). Landbouw op 7.1% BBP (wine, agriculture). Diensten op 62.3%. EU-kandidaat country (2022). Significant remittance dependence. Energy dependent on Russian gas (via Transnistria).

sectors.w: Moldova's agricultural sector is dominated by grain monoculture on degraded chernozem soils. Wanneer soil health data is linked to agricultural output, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: EU accession agricultural alignment — CAP-style milieu- conditionality. Wanneer subsidies reward soil health, het overlappende belang in exhaustive monoculture verzwakt.
Mandatory soil health monitoring per farm. Moldova's fertile chernozem soils are degrading — making this visible makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Grain monoculture degrades soil. Crop rotation and cover cropping can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

MG.s: Biodiversity hotspot economie ($17.4B BBP). Landbouw op 22.5% BBP. One of Earth's most biodiverse countries (90%+ species endemic). Devastating ontbossing (fr=5.45% forest rents). Mining growing (ilmenite, nickel). Extreme poverty.

sectors.w: Madagascar's slash-and-burn agriculture (tavy) has destroyed 90%+ of original forest. Wanneer ontbossing data is linked to agricultural output, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Alternative livelihood programs replacing tavy with agroforestry. Wanneer tree-crop income exceeds slash-and-burn yields, het overlappende belang in forest clearing breaks.
Satellite ontbossing monitoring linked to commune-level agricultural data. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Extreme systeemafhankelijkheid. Tavy on degraded laterite soils causes erosion and desertification. Madagascar's red soil runoff is visible from space.

MK.s: Small Western Balkan economie ($17B BBP). Productie op 14.3% BBP. Diensten op 56.2%. EU-kandidaat country. Coal-dependent energy. Landbouw op 6.1% BBP.

sectors.w: North Macedonia's lignite dependence (Bitola power plant) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make coal uncompetitive.

Sobranie (Assembly of North Macedonia) — unicameral, 120 members. EU-kandidaat country.

ML.s: Sahelian economie ($26.8B BBP) with gold mijnbouw (16.18% BBP) and agriculture (33.3% BBP). Military junta since 2020-2021 coups. Security crisis (jihadist insurgency). Third-largest gold producer in Africa.

sectors.w: Mali's gold mijnbouw generates mercury contamination (artisanal) and cyanide risks (industrial). Wanneer milieu- data is published alongside production, W wordt berekenbaar.

Per-mine milieu- monitoring published through EITI. Mali's EITI membership provides the framework.

Note: Military transition government. National Transitional Council replaces elected legislature. International channels: ECOWAS (Mali suspended), African Union, EITI Board.

MM.s: Resource-rich economie ($74.1B BBP) under military junta since 2021 coup. Gasinkomsten 4.4%. Jade and gem mijnbouw (est. $31B/year — more than formal BBP). Landbouw op 20.8% BBP. Civil war affecting multiple regions.

sectors.w: Myanmar's jade industry is largely opaque — estimated at $31B/year but mostly unrecorded. Wanneer jade revenue flows are made visible (Global Witness has documented significant flows to military), W wordt berekenbaar.

Supply chain transparantie for jade and gems using blockchain traceability. Global Witness and others have documented the flows — formalizing this breaks system independence.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes. Myanmar's jade mines in Kachin State have caused catastrophic landslides.

International channels: ASEAN (Special Envoy process), UN Human Rights Council, targeted sancties by US, EU, UK.

MN.s: Resource-dependent landlocked economie ($23.8B BBP). Mining at 26.57% BBP (copper, coal, gold). Coal at 4.89% BBP. Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine (Rio Tinto/Turquoise Hill). Parliamentary democratie — rare in the region.

sectors.w: Mongolia's mijnbouw sector (particularly coal and copper) generates dust pollution and depletes water in the Gobi. Wanneer per mijn milieu- data is linked to production revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.

Per-mine milieu- monitoring data published through EITI Mongolia. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining in arid environments inherently affects limited water resources. However, dry processing and water recycling can reduce dependence.

State Great Khural (Улсын Их Хурал) — unicameral parliament, 76 members. Contact through parliament.mn. Mongolia is a parlementair democratie with competitive elections since 1990.

MO.s: Casino and tourism economie ($49.5B BBP). Diensten op 83.8% BBP. World's largest gambling market (pre-COVID revenue $36B/year). Under Chinese sovereignty. Highly concentrated gambling concession system.

sectors.w: Macao's gambling industry generates significant social costs (problem gambling, money laundering) that are not captured in concession revenues. Wanneer social cost data is published alongside gross gaming revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Mandatory gambling harm data disclosure per concession. Wanneer social costs are visible alongside revenues, het overlappende belang in revenue maximization without harm mitigation verzwakt.

Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Gambling inherently creates addiction risk. However, harm reduction measures (exclusion programs, betting limits) can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

Assembleia Legislativa de Macau — 33 members (14 directly elected, 12 indirectly elected, 7 appointed). Macao is a Special Administrative Region of China with limited autonomy.

MR.s: Sahelian economie ($10.9B BBP) with mijnbouw (iron ore, 9.59% BBP) and agriculture (19.3% BBP). Visserij significant. New hydrogen and gas projects (GTA — Greater Tortue Ahmeyim). Coal at 0.67%.

MW.s: Low-income economie ($11.3B BBP). Landbouw op 31.8% BBP — tobacco is the largest export (50%+ of export revenue). One of the world's poorest countries. High climate vulnerability.

i: DOE (Jabatan Alam Sekitar / Department of Environment) — milieuautoriteit. SUHAKAM (Human Rights Commission of Malaysia) — investigates rights complaints including in palm oil sector. RSPO — Malaysia co-hosts the RSPO Secretariat.

Sime Darby Plantation — world's largest palm oil company by planted area. IOI Corporation, FGV (Felda Global Ventures) — major plantation companies. MPOB (Malaysian Palmolie Board) — the government agency overseeing the palm oil industry.
MPOB — oversees palm oil industry regulation and research. MSPO (Malaysian Sustainable Palmolie) — the national mandatory certification scheme.

Parliament of Malaysia — bicameral: Dewan Rakyat (222 members) and Dewan Negara (70 members). Contact through parlimen.gov.my. Malaysia is a federal constitutionele monarchie and parlementair democratie.

MZ.s: Resource-rich developing economie ($22.7B BBP). Major gas discoveries (Rovuma Basin — among world's largest LNG projects). Coal at 3.78%, gas at 3.57%. Landbouw op 25.2% BBP. Insurgency in Cabo Delgado province near gas projects.

sectors.w: Mozambique's Rovuma Basin LNG projects (TotalEnergies, ExxonMobil, Eni) are among the world's largest but face force majeure due to insurgency. Wanneer per-project milieu- and social cost data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Conditional development — LNG projects proceed only with binding community benefit and milieu- standards. Wanneer development is linked to social outcomes, het overlappende belang in extraction without accountability verzwakt.
Per-project milieu- disclosure for all Rovuma Basin operations. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. LNG production and combustion release CO₂ and methane.

i: MITADER — environment ministry. INP (Instituto Nacional de Petróleo) — the petroleum regulator. Note: Mozambique has limited klokkenluider protections. The Cabo Delgado insurgency complicates maatschappelijk middenveld operations in the gas-rich north.

TotalEnergies — leads the $20B Mozambique LNG project (currently under force majeure). ExxonMobil — leads Rovuma LNG. Eni — operates Coral South FLNG. ENH (Empresa Nacional de Hidrocarbonetos) — the national hydrocarbons company.
INP — the petroleum regulator. MIREME — oversees energy and mijnbouw policy. EITI Mozambique — member since 2012.
Assembleia da República de Moçambique — 250 members. Mozambique is a presidential republic. EITI membership since 2012.

NA.s: Upper-middle-income economie ($13.4B BBP) with mijnbouw at 3.17% (uranium, diamonds). Landbouw op 7.3% BBP. One of Africa's most stable democracies. Major new oil discoveries offshore (TotalEnergies, Shell). Green hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Namibia's uranium mijnbouw (Rössing, Husab — two of world's largest) generates radioactive waste and water issues in the Namib Desert. Wanneer per mijn milieu- monitoring is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Environmental bonds and water-use fees for uranium mijnbouw. Wanneer miners pay for water in one of Earth's driest environments, het overlappende belang in water-intensive extraction verzwakt.
Per-mine milieu- monitoring disclosure. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Uranium mijnbouw generates radioactive tailings. Improved containment can reduce but not eliminate systeemafhankelijkheid.

i: MEFT — environment ministry. NRPA — radiation protection authority. Namibia has relatively strong maatschappelijk middenveld for the region.
Rössing Uranium — one of world's largest (Rio Tinto). Husab mine — CNNC/CGN (Chinese staatsbedrijf). Namibia also has significant diamond mijnbouw (Namdeb — De Beers/government JV).
MME — oversees mijnbouw policy. Chamber of Mines of Namibia — the industry association.

Parliament of Namibia — bicameral: National Assembly (104 members) and National Council (42 members). Contact through parliament.na. Namibia is a presidential democratie with strong democratic credentials since independence (1990).

NE.s: Sahelian economie ($19.9B BBP). Landbouw op 34.5% BBP. Uranium mijnbouw (Arlit — supplies ~5% of world production, Orano/formerly Areva). Oil production growing. Military junta since July 2023 coup.

sectors.w: Niger's uranium mijnbouw (Orano operations at Arlit) generates radioactive tailings in water-scarce Sahel. Environmental monitoring data makes W computable.
bp: Environmental bonds for uranium operations. Wanneer remediation costs are pre-funded, overlappend belang in extraction without accountability verzwakt.
Per-mine milieu- monitoring. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Uranium mijnbouw generates long-lived radioactive waste. Containment reduces but doesn't eliminate systeemafhankelijkheid.

i: BNEE (Bureau National d'Évaluation Environnementale) — milieu- assessment authority. Note: Military rule since July 2023.
Orano — operates SOMAÏR and COMINAK uranium mines at Arlit (COMINAK closed 2021). Chinese companies (CNNPC) have expanding uranium interests.
Ministry of Mines — oversees mijnbouw policy. EITI Niger — member since 2005.
Note: Military junta since July 2023. CNSP (Conseil National pour la Sauvegarde de la Patrie). ECOWAS suspended Niger. International channels: African Union, IAEA, EITI Board.

NI.s: Small Central American economie ($19.7B BBP). Landbouw op 14.4% BBP. Mining at 2.68% (gold). Authoritarian governance under Ortega. Diensten op 46.8%.

sectors.w: Nicaragua's gold mijnbouw generates mercury and cyanide contamination. Wanneer milieu- data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Supply chain due diligence for gold sourced from Nicaragua.
Environmental monitoring per mine makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mercury-free processing can reduce impact.

i: MARENA (Ministry of Environment) — milieuautoriteit. Note: Nicaragua under Ortega is highly autoritair. Civil society is repressed.
Calibre Mining — operates gold mines in Nicaragua. B2Gold — formerly operated La Libertad mine.
Ministry of Energy and Mines — mijnbouw regulator.
Note: Asamblea Nacional (92 members) is controlled by FSLN. International channels: OAS (though Nicaragua withdrew), UN Human Rights Council, IACHR.

NP.s: Mountainous South Asian economie ($42.9B BBP). Landbouw op 21.9% BBP. Massive hydropower potential (~83 GW technically feasible, only ~2.3 GW developed). Remittances ~25% of BBP. Climate-vulnerable (glacial lake outburst floods).

sectors.w: Nepal's agriculture on steep hillsides causes erosion and landslides. Wanneer per-district soil loss and water quality data is linked to agricultural output, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Hervormen agricultural support toward terracing and agroforestry on hillsides. Wanneer hillside farmers are incentivized to conserve soil, het overlappende belang in unsustainable cultivation verzwakt.
Per-district soil erosion and water quality monitoring. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Agriculture on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Traditional terracing can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

i: DoE — milieuautoriteit under MOFE (Ministry of Forests and Environment). Nepal's 2015 Constitution devolves significant authority to local governments.
Nepal's agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Hydropower companies (NEA, private developers) have interests in watershed health.
MoALD (Ministry of Agriculture and Livestock Ontwikkelenment). DSCWM — responsible for soil conservation programs.
Federal Parliament — bicameral: Pratinidhi Sabha (275 members) and Rashtriya Sabha (59 members). Nepal is a federal democratic republic since 2008.

NZ.s: Advanced economie ($260.2B BBP) with intensive dairy farming driving agricultural exports. Landbouw op 4.4% BBP but outsized milieu- footprint (dairy is largest export sector). Diensten op 64.6%. Strong democratic institutions. Ambitious climate targets.

sectors.w: New Zealand's dairy intensification (6.3M dairy cows) has degraded waterways (nitrogen and E. coli contamination). Wanneer per-farm nutrient discharge data is published alongside farm revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Implementeren the NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) requiring bottom lines for water quality. Wanneer farmers face enforceable nutrient caps, het overlappende belang in herd expansion verzwakt.
Farm Environment Plans with mandatory public nutrient discharge data. NZ's 'He Waka Eke Noa' partnership generates farm-level data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Ruminant digestion produces methane biologically. Feed additives can reduce but not eliminate enteric methane. Riparian planting reduces but doesn't eliminate nutrient runoff.

i: Regional councils — the primary milieu- regulators under the Resource Management Act (RMA). MfE (Ministry for the Environment) — sets national milieu- policy. NZ Protected Disclosures (Protection of Whistleblowers) Act 2022 — strong klokkenluider protection.
Fonterra Co-operative Group — the world's largest dairy exporter, processing ~80% of NZ milk. Fonterra's procurement standards directly influence ~10,000 dairy farms.
NPS-FM (National Policy Statement for Freshwater Management 2020) — requires regional councils to set limits on resource use to achieve milieu- bottom lines. MPI — oversees primary sector policy.

New Zealand Parliament (House of Representatives, 120 members, MMP electoral system). Contact through parliament.nz. NZ Climate Change Response (Zero Carbon) Amendment Act 2019 sets separate targets for biogenic methane.

OM.s: Oil-dependent Gulf economie ($107.1B BBP) with 29.21% combined oil and gas rents. PDO (Petroleum Ontwikkelenment Oman, 60% government, 34% Shell) is the main operator. Diversifying through Oman Vision 2040. Hydrogen ambitions.

sectors.w: Oman's oil production uses enhanced oil recovery (EOR) including solar-powered steam injection. As EOR costs rise on mature fields, diversification to green hydrogen becomes economically rational.
bp: Green hydrogen investment as alternative export commodity. Oman has committed $30B+ to green hydrogen projects. Wanneer hydrogen revenue streams are established, het overlappende belang in oil dependence verzwakt.
Per-field emissies disclosure for all PDO and other operator operations. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂.

i: Environment Authority (EA) — Oman's milieu- regulator. PDO (Petroleum Ontwikkelenment Oman) — Shell manages PDO operations.
PDO — produces ~70% of Oman's oil. OQ (formerly Oman Oil Company) — the state energy holding company. Hydrom — the government entity driving Oman's green hydrogen ambitions.
Ministry of Energy and Minerals — oversees energy policy. Hydrom — manages green hydrogen project tenders.
Majlis Oman — bicameral: Majlis al-Shura (86 elected) and Majlis al-Dawla (86 appointed). Oman is a sultanate with limited but growing parlementair activity.

PA.s: Services-dominant economie ($86.5B BBP) with the Panama Canal generating significant revenue. Financial services hub. Mining at 3.58% (Cobre Panamá copper mine — First Quantum, closed by Supreme Court ruling 2023). Diensten op 69.3%.

sectors.w: Panama's Supreme Court ruled the Cobre Panamá mijnbouw contract unconstitutional in November 2023, following massive public protests. The overlappend belang between the mijnbouw company and government has been broken by democratic action.
bp: The Cobre Panamá precedent — democratic rejection of mijnbouw contracts that do not serve the public interest. This is a direct break of the overlappend belang through civic action and judicial review.
Environmental monitoring of mine closure and remediation. Making closure costs visible makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. The mine exists — remediation is needed regardless. Closure reduces ongoing systeemafhankelijkheid.

i: MiAmbiente — the environment ministry. ANAM (Autoridad Nacional del Ambiente) — milieuautoriteit. Panama's Supreme Court (Corte Suprema de Justicia) — ruled the mijnbouw contract unconstitutional.
First Quantum Minerals — operated Cobre Panamá, one of the world's largest copper mines ($10B investment). The mine is in preservation and safe management mode following the court ruling.
Ministerio de Comercio e Industrias — oversees mijnbouw concessions. Contraloría General de la República — the national audit office.

Asamblea Nacional de Panamá — unicameral, 71 members. Panama's Cobre Panamá case is a globally significant precedent for democratic control over extractive industries. First Quantum has filed an ICSID arbitration claim.

PE.s: Resource-rich economie ($289.2B BBP) with mijnbouw at 12.1% BBP (world's second-largest copper producer, major silver and gold). Landbouw op 7.3%. Diensten op 51.3%. Social conflicts around mijnbouw are frequent.

sectors.w: Peru's mijnbouw sector generates over 200 active social conflicts (Defensoría del Pueblo tracks monthly). Wanneer milieu- monitoring data is publicly linked to mine production revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Prior consultation (consulta previa) enforcement per ILO Convention 169. Wanneer indigenous communities can effectively negotiate milieu- conditions, het overlappende belang in extraction without consent verzwakt.
Mandatory per mijn milieu- monitoring data published in real-time (OEFA already collects this). Public disclosure makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining disturbs landscapes. But Peru's mijnbouw milieu- standards have improved significantly — enforcement is the gap.

i: OEFA — Peru's milieu- enforcement agency for the mijnbouw sector, conducting inspections and imposing sancties. Defensoría del Pueblo — the national ombudsman, publishes monthly social conflict reports. SENACE (Servicio Nacional de Certificación Ambiental) — conducts milieu- impact assessments.
Major mines: Antamina (BHP/Glencore), Cerro Verde (Freeport-McMoRan), Las Bambas (MMG/China Minmetals). SNMPE (Sociedad Nacional de Minería, Petróleo y Energía) — the industry association.
MINEM (Ministerio de Energía y Minas) — the energy and mijnbouw ministry. ANA — the national water authority. EITI Peru — member since 2012.
Congreso de la República del Perú — unicameral, 130 members. Contact through congreso.gob.pe. Peru has ratified ILO Convention 169. Peru has not ratified the Escazú Agreement.

PG.s: Resource-rich Pacific island economie ($31.8B BBP). Mining at 14.41% BBP, gas at 9.14% (PNG LNG). Landbouw op 16.4%. Extraordinary biodiversity (7% of world's species on 1% of land). Customary land ownership covers 97% of territory.

sectors.w: PNG's mijnbouw sector (Ok Tedi, Porgera, Lihir) has a history of catastrophic milieu- damage. Ok Tedi mine discharged tailings directly into the Fly River system for decades. Environmental monitoring makes W computable.
bp: Mandatory milieu- bonds per IFC Performance Standards. Wanneer remediation is pre-funded, overlappend belang in low-cost disposal verzwakt.
Per-mine milieu- monitoring published alongside production revenue. PNG's EITI membership provides the framework. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining in tropical environments disturbs highly biodiverse ecosystems. But modern tailings management (not riverine disposal) can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

i: CEPA — PNG's milieuautoriteit. Department of Mineral Policy and Geohazards Management — mijnbouw regulator. Note: PNG's governance capacity is limited outside major urban centers.
Ok Tedi Mining Limited — operates Ok Tedi copper-gold mine (now community-owned). Barrick Gold — Porgera gold mine. Newmont (formerly Newcrest) — Lihir gold mine. ExxonMobil — operates PNG LNG.
MRA — the mijnbouw regulator. EITI PNG — member since 2014.
National Parliament of Papua New Guinea — unicameral, 111 members. PNG is a constitutionele monarchie (King Charles III as head of state) with Westminster-style parlementair democratie.

PH.s: Major Southeast Asian economie ($461.6B BBP). Diensten op 63.2% BBP. Landbouw op 9.1%. Mining at 1.52% (nickel — world's second-largest producer). Productie op 15.7% (electronics). Extreme climate vulnerability — typhoons.

sectors.w: Philippines' nickel mijnbouw (for EV batteries) generates significant milieu- damage on small islands. Wanneer per mijn milieu- data is linked to nickel exports, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Environmental compliance as condition for mijnbouw permits. President Duterte's 2017 mijnbouw audit closed 28 mines. Sustained enforcement breaks het overlappende belang in non-compliant extraction.
Per-mine milieu- monitoring and community impact data. DENR already collects data — public disclosure makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining on small islands with fragile ecosystems inherently causes significant damage. But modern methods can reduce impact.

i: DENR — the environment and natural resources department. MGB (Mines and Geosciences Bureau) — manages mijnbouw regulation. Philippines has relatively active maatschappelijk middenveld and press freedom.
Nickel Asia Corporation — the country's largest nickel producer. Global Ferronickel Holdings. Philippines is the world's second-largest nickel producer.
EMB (Environmental Management Bureau) — under DENR, responsible for pollution control. Philippine Mining Act of 1995 — governs mijnbouw operations.
Congress of the Philippines — bicameral: House of Representatives (316 members) and Senate (24 members). Contact through congress.gov.ph. Philippines is a presidential democratie.

PK.s: Large economie ($371.6B BBP) with agriculture at 23.7% BBP (cotton, wheat, rice, sugarcane). Productie op 13.2%. Diensten op 50.7%. Severe climate vulnerability (2022 floods caused $30B+ damage). Water stress. Coal at 0.12%, gas at 0.74%.

sectors.w: Pakistan's cotton-wheat-rice monoculture cycle depletes groundwater and degrades soil. Wanneer per-district water table and soil health data is published alongside agricultural output, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Hervormen agricultural subsidies from input-based to outcome-based. Wanneer farmers are rewarded for water efficiency rather than maximum extraction, het overlappende belang in water-intensive monoculture verzwakt.
Per-district groundwater monitoring and soil health data. WAPDA already monitors water — linking to agricultural output makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Irrigated agriculture in semi-arid conditions inherently depletes water. But drip irrigation and crop diversification can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

i: Pakistan EPA — federal milieuautoriteit. WAPDA — manages water resources and irrigation. Provincial EPAs — each province has its own milieu- agency.
Pakistan's agricultural sector is fragmented among smallholders. Major cotton buyers include Pakistani textile mills and international brands sourcing from Pakistan.

Ministry of National Food Security and Research — federal agricultural policy. IRSA — manages Indus water distribution among provinces. Pakistan Council of Research in Water Resources (PCRWR) — monitors groundwater.
Parliament of Pakistan — bicameral: National Assembly (342 members) and Senate (100 members). Contact through na.gov.pk. Pakistan is a federal parlementair democratie.

PL.s: Major EU economie ($917.8B BBP) with significant coal sector (0.25% rents but coal provides ~70% of electricity). Productie op 16.1% BBP. Diensten op 59.1%. Coal transition is Poland's central climate challenge — 80,000+ miners.

sectors.w: Poland's coal sector is sustained by state subsidies and employment guarantees. EU ETS carbon pricing makes Polish coal uncompetitive. Wanneer full carbon costs are internalized, the overlappend belang between miners and state employment programs breaks.
bp: EU ETS alignment without free allowances. At €90/ton carbon, Polish coal electricity costs 2-3x renewable alternatives. The overlappend belang breaks when coal plants cannot compete.
Per-plant emissies and health-impact disclosure. Poland's coal plants cause 4,000+ premature deaths/year. Making health costs visible per MWh makes W computable.
Niet breekbaar. Coal combustion releases CO₂ and air pollutants.

Document health impacts in mijnbouw regions — report to GIS (Chief Sanitary Inspectorate)
Use Polish klokkenluider law (2024 transposition of EU Directive)

Support EU Just Transition Fund maximization for Silesia and other coal regions
Advocate for EU Green Deal implementation with adequate transition support

i: GIOŚ (Główny Inspektorat Ochrony Środowiska) — the chief milieu- inspectorate. GIS (Główny Inspektorat Sanitarny) — the chief sanitary inspectorate monitoring public health. Poland transposed the EU Whistleblower Directive in 2024.

PGE (Polska Grupa Energetyczna) — Poland's largest energy company. Tauron, Enea — other major energy companies. PGG (Polska Grupa Górnicza) — Poland's largest coal mijnbouw company (staatsbedrijf, ~40,000 employees).

URE (Urząd Regulacji Energetyki) — the energieregulator. NFEP (Narodowy Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska) — the milieu- fund financing green transition. Poland's coal phase-out agreement with mijnbouw unions targets 2049.

Sejm (460 members) and Senat (100 members). Contact through sejm.gov.pl and senat.gov.pl. EU Just Transition Fund — Poland is the largest recipient of JTF funding. Poland's 2020 coal phase-out agreement targets closure of all coal mines by 2049.

PR.s: US unincorporated territory ($126B BBP) with pharmaceutical manufacturing (44.1% of BBP — among world's highest pharma concentration). Diensten op 51.8%. Post-Hurricane Maria (2017) infrastructure challenges. LUMA Energy electricity crisis.

sectors.w: Puerto Rico has one of the highest obesity rates in the US. Imported UPF dominates the food supply (85%+ of food is imported). Wanneer diet-related healthcare costs (Medicaid/Medicare data) are linked to product categories, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Hervormen food import tax structure to incentivize fresh food over UPF. Wanneer imported UPF faces higher tariffs than fresh food, het overlappende belang in high-margin processed imports verzwakt.
CMS (Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services) data on Puerto Rico diet-related healthcare costs per product category. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Not fully breakable. Ultra-processing alters food matrix. But Puerto Rico's tropical climate allows significant local food production to reduce import dependence.
a: Rapporteren aan FDA (applies to Puerto Rico as US territory)
Document food safety violations to Puerto Rico Department of Health
Use US federal klokkenluider protections
Food importers: Diversify toward fresh and minimally processed products
Support local food production development

Support the Farm Bill provisions for Puerto Rico food sovereignty
Advocate for SNAP block grant reform to incentivize fresh food
Aandringen op local food production investment through USDA programs
i: FDA — the US Food and Drug Administration has jurisdiction in Puerto Rico. Puerto Rico Department of Health — oversees local food safety. US federal klokkenluider protections apply.
Major food retailers in Puerto Rico: Walmart, Econo. Empresas Fonalledas — local retail conglomerate.
PR Department of Agriculture — supports local agricultural development. Puerto Rico imports ~85% of food consumed.

Puerto Rico has a Resident Commissioner in the US House of Representatives (non-voting). Legislatura de Puerto Rico — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (51 members) and Senado (27 members). As a US territory, many policy decisions are made at the federal level.

PS.s: Occupied territory ($13.7B BBP, severely constrained by occupation). Landbouw op 7.4% BBP. Diensten op 76.2%. Economy dependent on Israeli work permits and international aid. Water access severely restricted. Active conflict zone.

sectors.w: Palestinian agriculture operates under severe water restrictions (Oslo II Accords limit Palestinian water extraction). Wanneer water allocation data is published alongside agricultural output, the systemic welfare impact of occupation on agriculture becomes computable.
bp: International pressure for equitable water allocation per Oslo II renegotiation. Wanneer Palestinian farmers access fair water shares, het overlappende belang in restricting agricultural development verzwakt.
Publication of per-community water allocation and agricultural productivity data. International monitoring (OCHA, World Bank) already collects data — systematic disclosure makes W computable.
Extreme systeemafhankelijkheid. The occupation structurally constrains agricultural development through water restrictions, land access, and movement controls.
a: Document water access restrictions through Palestinian Water Authority channels
Rapporteren aan international monitoring organizations (OCHA, B'Tselem)
Provide data to academic researchers studying occupation impacts on agriculture
International agricultural companies: Support Palestinian agricultural development programs
Fair trade organizations: Expand Palestinian olive oil and agricultural product sourcing
Investeren in water-efficient agriculture technology appropriate for restricted water access
EQA: Document milieu- impacts of occupation on agriculture
PWA: Advocate for equitable water allocation
PMA (Palestine Monetary Authority): Support agricultural lending
Support international humanitarian law enforcement on resource access in occupied territories
Pleiten via UN for equitable water allocation
Aandringen op World Bank monitoring of economic impact of water restrictions on Palestinian agriculture
Support Palestinian sovereignty over natural resources as enshrined in UNGA resolutions
i: PWA (Palestinian Water Authority) — manages water resources under severe constraints. EQA (Environment Quality Authority) — the Palestinian milieuautoriteit. B'Tselem — Israeli human rights organization documenting occupation impacts.
Palestinian agricultural sector is predominantly smallholder. Olive oil is the most significant agricultural export. International NGOs and development agencies support agricultural development.

PWA — the key institution managing water allocation under occupation constraints. Joint Water Committee (JWC) — the Oslo-established mechanism for water cooperation between Israel and Palestine, widely criticized as inequitable.

Palestinian Legislative Council (PLC, 132 members) — non-functional since 2007. The Palestinian Authority operates through the executive. International channels: UNGA, UNHRC, ICJ Advisory Opinion on the Wall (2004), UN OCHA, UNRWA.

PT.s: EU economie ($313.3B BBP). Diensten op 66.3% BBP. Landbouw op 2% (cork, wine, olive oil). Productie op 11.8%. Renewable energy leader (70%+ of electricity from renewables). Successfully phased out coal (2021).

sectors.w: Portugal's SNS (Serviço Nacional de Saúde) tracks healthcare costs. Publishing diet-related costs per product category makes W computable.
bp: Implementeren EU front-of-pack health labelling.
SNS diet-related healthcare cost data publication. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Not fully breakable. Hervormenulation mandates reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.
a: Rapporteren aan ASAE (Authority for Food and Economic Safety)
Use Portuguese klokkenluider law (Lei 93/2021)
Portuguese food companies: Hervormenulate products
Aannemen front-of-pack labelling
DGS (Directorate-General of Health): Implementeren labelling
ASAE: Handhaven marketing standards
SNS: Publish health expenditure data
Neem contact op met uw Deputado in the Assembleia da República (230 members) om te eisen health labelling
Support EU Farm to Fork Strategy
i: ASAE (Autoridade de Segurança Alimentar e Económica) — food safety and economic inspection. Lei 93/2021 — Portugal's klokkenluider protection law.
Jerónimo Martins (Pingo Doce) — major Portuguese retailer. FIPA (Federação das Indústrias Portuguesas Agro-Alimentares) — food industry federation.
DGS (Direção-Geral da Saúde) — public health authority. SNS — the national health service.
Assembleia da República — unicameral, 230 members. Contact through parlamento.pt. Portugal is a parlementair democratie.

PY.s: Landlocked South American economie ($44.5B BBP). Landbouw op 10.7% BBP (massive soy production — 4th largest exporter globally). Productie op 19% BBP. Diensten op 48.7%. Itaipú Dam provides 90%+ renewable electricity. Severe ontbossing from soy expansion.

sectors.w: Paraguay's soy monoculture has destroyed 90%+ of Atlantic Forest and drives ongoing Chaco ontbossing. Wanneer per-farm ontbossing and bodemdegradatie data is linked to soy exports, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: EUDR compliance requiring zero-ontbossing soy. Wanneer EU buyers require verified ontbossing-free origin, het overlappende belang in Chaco clearing for soy breaks.
Satellite-based ontbossing monitoring linked to soy export data. Global Forest Watch already tracks Paraguay extensively — linking to farm-level data makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Soy monoculture inherently reduces biodiversity. But no-till farming and cover cropping can reduce bodemdegradatie.
a: Report illegal ontbossing to SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente)
Document indigenous land rights violations — report to INDI (Instituto Paraguayo del Indígena)
Report through commodity trader compliance channels (Cargill, Bunge, ADM)
Commodity traders (Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus): Implementeren zero-ontbossing soy sourcing for Paraguay
Aannemen Soy Moratorium-style commitments for the Chaco
Investeren in yield improvement on existing farmland
MADES: Handhaven the Zero Deforestation Law in the Eastern Region and extend to the Chaco
SENAVE (Servicio Nacional de Calidad y Sanidad Vegetal): Integrate milieu- standards into soy export certification
INFONA: Versterken forest monitoring and enforcement
Neem contact op met uw Diputado or Senador in the Congreso Nacional om te eisen extension of the Zero Deforestation Law to the Chaco
Support EUDR implementation with transition support for Paraguayan farmers
Advocate for Mercosur milieu- provisions enforcement
Aandringen op indigenous land rights recognition in soy expansion zones
i: SEAM (Secretaría del Ambiente) — now MADES (Ministerio del Ambiente y Desarrollo Sostenible). INFONA (Instituto Forestal Nacional) — the forest management authority. INDI — the indigenous affairs institute.
Major soy traders operating in Paraguay: Cargill, Bunge, ADM, Louis Dreyfus. CAPPRO (Cámara Paraguaya de Procesadores de Oleaginosas y Cereales) — the oilseed processors' association.
MADES — environment ministry. Zero Deforestation Law (Ley 2524/2004) — prohibits conversion of forest to agriculture in the Eastern Region (but not the Chaco, where ontbossing continues).
Congreso Nacional del Paraguay — bicameral: Cámara de Diputados (80 members) and Cámara de Senadores (45 members). Paraguay is a presidential republic.

QA.s: Hydrocarbon-dominated economie ($219.2B BBP). Industrie op 58.2% BBP. Olie-inkomsten 15.28% BBP, gas rents 12.01% BBP — world's largest LNG exporter. Diensten op 46.1%. Highest per-capita CO₂ emissies globally. Absolute monarchy.

sectors.w: Qatar's LNG dominance faces demand erosion as importing nations (Japan, South Korea, EU) diversify toward renewables and hydrogen. Wanneer importers reduce LNG dependence, the overlappend belang verzwakt.
bp: Importer diversification away from Qatari LNG. As Japan, Korea, and Europe invest in renewables and green hydrogen, het overlappende belang in fossil gas dependence verzwakt.
Per-field emissies and flaring data disclosure. Qatar Energy already publishes aggregate sustainability data — extending to field-level reporting makes W computable.
Niet breekbaar. LNG combustion releases CO₂. Carbon capture on LNG (pre-combustion at liquefaction) captures only a fraction of lifecycle emissies.
a: Rapporteren aan QatarEnergy HSE division
Documenteren via international joint venture partner channels (ExxonMobil, Shell, TotalEnergies)
Rapporteren aan Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
QatarEnergy: Accelerate carbon capture at Ras Laffan
Investeren in blue and green hydrogen
Reduce routine flaring to zero
