Qatar National Vision 2030: Integrate emissies reduction targets
Pleiten via GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) for regional emissies standards
Support Global Methane Pledge commitments
Aandringen op LNG buyer nations to condition contracts on emissies intensity
Engage through OPEC for managed fossil fuel transition
i: QatarEnergy (formerly Qatar Petroleum) — the state hydrocarbon company controlling all oil and gas operations. International partners operate under production-sharing agreements.
QatarEnergy — staatsbedrijf, operates the world's largest LNG facility at Ras Laffan Industrial City. North Field — the world's largest non-associated gas field.
Ministry of Environment and Climate Change — milieu- regulator. KAHRAMAA — electricity and water utility. Qatar National Vision 2030 — the national strategic framework.

Qatar is an absolute monarchy — the Emir governs by decree. Advisory Shura Council (45 members, 30 elected since 2021) has limited legislative power. International channels: GCC, OPEC (Qatar withdrew 2019 but re-engaged), COP process.

RO.s: EU-lid economie ($382.6B BBP). Productie op 13.2% BBP. Gasinkomsten 0.53%, oil 0.38%. Diensten op 62.6%. Significant forestry issues — illegal logging in old-growth Carpathian forests despite EU-lidship.

sectors.w: Romania's large-scale agricultural land consolidation has created monoculture on former smallholdings. Wanneer soil health data is linked to EU CAP payments, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme conditionality. Wanneer subsidy payments depend on crop rotation and soil health metrics, het overlappende belang in exhaustive monoculture verzwakt.
Per-farm soil health monitoring through APIA (Agency for Payments and Intervention in Agriculture). Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Grain monoculture degrades Romania's fertile black-earth soils. Cover cropping and crop rotation reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.
a: Report illegal logging to Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură
Rapporteren aan Garda Forestieră (Forest Guard)
Documenteren via Agent Green or EuroNatur
Large agricultural companies: Implementeren EU eco-schemes

ANPM (National Environmental Protection Agency): Expand monitoring

Submit EU Pilot complaints on illegal logging through European Commission
Support ECA (European Court of Auditors) reviews of CAP implementation
Pleiten via European Parliament for Carpathian old-growth forest protection
i: Garda Forestieră — Romania's forest guard, responsible for enforcing the Forest Code. Inspectoratul de Stat pentru Controlul în Silvicultură — state forestry inspectorate. Agent Green — Romanian milieu- NGO documenting illegal logging.
Romania has significant foreign-owned agricultural land. HS Timber (formerly Holzindustrie Schweighofer) — major timber processor, previously linked to illegal logging controversies.
APIA (Agenția de Plăți și Intervenție pentru Agricultură) — manages EU CAP payments. ANPM — milieu- protection agency. Ministry of Environment, Waters and Forests.
Parlamentul României — bicameral: Camera Deputaților (330 members) and Senat (136 members). EU-lid since 2007. Contact through cdep.ro and senat.ro.

RS.s: Western Balkan economie ($90.1B BBP). Productie op 12.7%. Koleninkomsten 0.24% BBP — but coal supplies ~70% of electricity. EU-kandidaat country. Mining sector growing (Rio Tinto lithium project controversy).

sectors.w: Serbia's lignite dependence (Nikola Tesla power plants — among Europe's worst SO₂ emitters) faces EU accession conditionality. EU ETS alignment will make lignite uncompetitive.
bp: EU accession requiring LCPD/IED compliance. Retrofitting Nikola Tesla A and B to meet EU emission limits costs more than replacement with renewables.
Per-plant emissies and health cost data. HEAL (Health and Environment Alliance) has documented thousands of premature deaths. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury.
a: Rapporteren aan Ministry of Environmental Protection
Documenteren via CEKOR (Center for Ecology and Sustainable Ontwikkelenment)
Report through EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) channels
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije): Ontwikkelen lignite phase-out roadmap
Investeren in solar and wind capacity
Plan just transition for Kolubara mijnbouw basin communities
AERS (Energy Agency): Hervormen tariffs to reflect milieu- costs
Ministry of Mining and Energy: Aannemen Energy Community Decarbonization Roadmap
Energy Community Secretariat: Handhaven compliance

Support EU accession milieu- chapter benchmarks
Pleiten via Energy Community for binding decarbonization targets
Aandringen op EU Just Transition Fund pre-accession support
i: Ministry of Environmental Protection — milieuautoriteit. CEKOR — Serbian milieu- NGO. RES Foundation — hernieuwbare energie advocacy.
EPS (Elektroprivreda Srbije) — state electricity utility operating Nikola Tesla A (1650 MW) and B (1240 MW) lignite plants. Kolubara mijnbouw basin — supplies lignite to these plants.
AERS (Agencija za energetiku Republike Srbije) — energieregulator. Serbia is an Energy Community Treaty member, requiring alignment with EU energy acquis.
Narodna skupština (National Assembly) — unicameral, 250 members. EU-kandidaat country since 2012. Energy Community Treaty member.

RU.s: Major hydrocarbon economie ($2,173.8B BBP). Olie-inkomsten 9.67%, gas rents 5.86%, coal 0.61%, mijnbouw 2.05% BBP. World's largest gas exporter, second-largest oil exporter. Militaire uitgaven 7.05% BBP. Authoritarian governance under international sancties since 2022.

sectors.w: Russia's oil and gas revenues have been severely constrained by Western sancties and price caps since 2022. Buyer diversification (EU pivot away from Russian gas) is actively breaking the overlappend belang.
bp: Buyer diversification already underway. EU reduced Russian gas imports from ~40% to ~15% of supply. Wanneer importers eliminate dependence, het overlappende belang in Russian fossil fuels breaks.
Sanctions-enforced transparantie — G7 price cap mechanism requires attestation of pricing. This partially makes W computable, though enforcement gaps remain.
Niet breekbaar. Hydrocarbon combustion releases CO₂ regardless of source.
a: Report through international channels (Bellona Foundation, Global Witness)
Provide data to sancties enforcement authorities
Documenteren via investigative journalism networks (iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe)
International oil companies that exited Russia: Maintain divestment
Shipping companies: Comply with price cap attestation requirements
Insurance companies: Handhaven sancties compliance on Russian oil cargoes
G7 price cap coalition: Versterken enforcement against evasion
EU: Close sancties loopholes on refined products
IMO (International Maritime Organization): Address dark fleet safety risks
Support and strengthen international sancties on Russian fossil fuel revenues

Aandringen op addressing Russia's shadow fleet milieu- risks in Arctic and Baltic

i: Note: Russia's domestic maatschappelijk middenveld is severely repressed. Bellona Foundation (Norway-based) — documents Russian milieu- issues. iStories, Novaya Gazeta Europe — independent Russian media operating from exile.
Gazprom — state gas monopoly. Rosneft — state oil company. Most Western majors (Shell, BP, ExxonMobil) have exited Russian operations since 2022.
G7 Russian Oil Price Cap Coalition — enforces $60/barrel cap through insurance and shipping services. EU sancties packages (14+ rounds). OFAC (US), OFSI (UK) — sancties enforcement.

Note: Russia's Federal Assembly (Federalnoye Sobraniye — State Duma 450 members, Federation Council 170 members) does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: G7/G20 (Russia suspended from G8), UN General Assembly, international sancties coalitions.

RW.s: Small East African economie ($14.3B BBP). Landbouw op 24.6% BBP. Bosinkomsten 3.97%. Diensten op 47.6%. Remarkable post-genocide development but autoritair governance. Strong milieu- policy (plastic bag ban pioneer).

sectors.w: Rwanda's hillside agriculture on steep terrain causes erosion and bodemdegradatie. Wanneer soil erosion data is linked to agricultural output per district, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Terracing and agroforestry expansion. Rwanda already has extensive terracing programs — extending to all cultivated hillsides with measurable soil retention targets breaks the overlappend belang.
Per-district soil erosion monitoring linked to agricultural productivity data. Rwanda's strong data infrastructure supports this. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Hillside cultivation on steep slopes inherently risks erosion. Terracing and contour farming reduce but cannot eliminate systeemafhankelijkheid.
a: Rapporteren aan REMA (Rwanda Environment Management Authority)
Documenteren via RAB (Rwanda Agriculture and Animal Resources Ontwikkelenment Board)
Report through district agronomist offices
Agricultural cooperatives: Aannemen terracing and cover cropping standards
Coffee and tea exporters: Require sustainable hillside cultivation practices
NAEB (National Agricultural Export Ontwikkelenment Board): Integrate soil health into export quality standards
MINAGRI (Ministry of Agriculture): Expand terracing programs to all cultivated slopes
REMA: Handhaven hillside protection zones

Support Great Lakes milieu- cooperation through ICGLR (International Conference on the Great Lakes Region)
Advocate for climate adaptation funding for hillside agriculture through Green Climate Fund
Support African Union milieu- governance frameworks
i: REMA — the milieu- management authority. RAB — agricultural research and extension. Rwanda has strong institutional capacity relative to income level.
NAEB — manages agricultural export promotion (coffee, tea, pyrethrum). Rwanda's agricultural sector is organized through cooperatives and imihigo (performance contracts).
MINAGRI — agriculture ministry. RLMUA — land use authority. Rwanda's Vision 2050 includes milieu- sustainability targets.

Inteko Ishinga Amategeko (Parliament) — bicameral: Chamber of Deputies (80 members) and Senate (26 members). Note: Rwanda is effectively a one-party dominant state under RPF (Rwandan Patriotic Front). International channels: EAC (East African Community), AU, ICGLR.

SD.s: Conflict-affected economie ($49.7B BBP). Landbouw op 22.2% BBP. Mining 6.63% (gold). Olie-inkomsten 3.3% (reduced after South Sudan's independence). Civil war since April 2023 between SAF and RSF. Humanitarian catastrophe.

sectors.w: Sudan's artisanal gold mijnbouw uses mercury extensively and generates revenue streams funding armed groups. Wanneer gold revenue flows are traced, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: International supply chain due diligence blocking conflict gold. Wanneer refiners verify provenance, the overlappend belang between armed groups and gold revenues verzwakt.
Tracing gold flows from artisanal mines to international markets. LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) responsible sourcing standards provide the framework. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Artisanal mijnbouw uses mercury (Minamata Convention violation). Mercury-free processing methods exist but require investment.
a: Report through international monitoring organizations (UN Panel of Experts on Sudan)
Documenteren via INGO networks (Global Witness, IPIS)
Provide data to LBMA on gold provenance
International gold refiners: Implementeren enhanced due diligence on Sudanese gold
UAE gold traders: Apply LBMA responsible sourcing for Sudan-origin gold
Insurance and logistics companies: Screen for conflict-linked gold shipments
LBMA: Add Sudan to high-risk origin list
UAE authorities: Enhance customs screening for Sudanese gold
International sancties bodies: Target RSF gold revenue streams
Support UN Security Council sancties on conflict gold flows
Advocate for enhanced LBMA responsible sourcing enforcement
Aandringen op UAE cooperation on gold trade transparantie
Support Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal mijnbouw
i: Note: Sudan is in active civil war. No functioning domestic oversight exists. UN Panel of Experts — monitors sancties and conflict dynamics. IPIS (International Peace Information Service) — tracks artisanal mijnbouw and conflict resources.
Sudan's gold primarily flows through UAE (Dubai) trading hubs. LBMA — sets responsible sourcing standards for gold refiners worldwide.
LBMA — London Bullion Market Association, responsible sourcing standard-setter. FATF (Financial Action Task Force) — can designate jurisdictions for gold laundering risks.

Note: Sudan's transitional government collapsed with the April 2023 war. No functioning legislature. International channels: UN Security Council, AU (African Union Peace and Security Council), IGAD (Intergovernmental Authority on Ontwikkelenment).

SE.s: Advanced Nordic economie ($603.7B BBP). Productie op 13% BBP. Mining 1% BBP (iron ore — LKAB is Europe's largest). Diensten op 66.4%. Strong milieu- regulations. EU-lid. Leading in green steel transition (HYBRIT).

sectors.w: Sweden's iron ore mijnbouw (LKAB) in northern Sweden affects Sami reindeer herding land and generates tailings. Wanneer per mijn milieu- and indigenous impact data is published alongside production, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Full internalization of indigenous land-use costs and milieu- remediation. Wanneer LKAB pays for herding disruption and tailings management, het overlappende belang in low-cost extraction verzwakt.
Per-mine milieu- disclosure including impacts on Sami land use. LKAB publishes sustainability reports — extending to independently verified indigenous impact assessments makes W computable.

Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. HYBRIT (Hydrogen Breakthrough Ironmaking Technology) — SSAB/LKAB/Vattenfall joint venture — is producing fossil-free steel, demonstrating that mijnbouw's downstream systeemafhankelijkheid on carbon-intensive processing can be broken.
a: Rapporteren aan Naturvårdsverket (Swedish Environmental Protection Agency)
Rapporteren aan Bergsstaten (Mining Inspectorate of Sweden)
Documenteren via Sametinget (Sami Parliament) channels
LKAB: Accelerate HYBRIT fossil-free iron and steel
SSAB: Scale fossil-free steel production
Boliden: Implementeren enhanced tailings management and water recycling
Bergsstaten: Versterken milieu- conditions in mijnbouw permits
Mark- och miljödomstolarna (Land and Environment Courts): Apply rigorous milieu- review
SGU: Integrate indigenous land-use data into mijnbouw assessments
Neem contact op met uw Riksdagsledamot in the Riksdag (349 members) om te eisen indigenous consent requirements in mijnbouw permits
Pleiten via EU Critical Raw Materials Act for milieu- and indigenous rights safeguards
Support Nordic Council cooperation on Sami rights across borders
Aandringen op EU taxonomy alignment of mijnbouw milieu- standards
i: Naturvårdsverket — milieu- protection agency. Bergsstaten — the mijnbouw inspectorate, part of SGU (Sveriges geologiska undersökning — Geological Survey of Sweden). Sametinget — the Sami Parliament, representing indigenous Sami rights.

LKAB — staatsbedrijf iron ore company, Europe's largest. SSAB — steel producer, partner in HYBRIT. Boliden — base metals mijnbouw and smelting company. HYBRIT — world's first fossil-free steel initiative.
Mark- och miljödomstolarna — specialized milieu- courts. Sweden's Minerals Act (Minerallagen) governs mijnbouw permits.
Riksdag — unicameral parliament, 349 members. Contact through riksdagen.se. Sweden is a constitutionele monarchie and EU-lid.

SG.s: Advanced city-state economie ($547.4B BBP). Diensten op 73% BBP. Productie op 16.3% (electronics, petrochemicals). No natural resources. Major petrochemical refining hub and global financial center. World's busiest transshipment port.

sectors.w: Singapore is a major petrochemical refining and trading hub — the 'Houston of Asia.' Wanneer refinery emissies and fossil fuel trading flows are disclosed per facility, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Carbon tax escalation (Singapore's koolstofbelasting rises to S$25/tCO₂ in 2024, S$45 in 2026, S$50-80 by 2030). Wanneer refining margins incorporate carbon costs, het overlappende belang in unpriced emissies verzwakt.
Per-refinery emissies and trade-flow disclosure. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) climate disclosure requirements extend to financial flows. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Petrochemical refining inherently emits. However, Singapore's investment in sustainable aviation fuel and green hydrogen can reduce systeemafhankelijkheid over time.
a: Rapporteren aan NEA (National Environment Agency)
Report through MAS klokkenluider channels for financial misconduct
Documenteren via SGX (Singapore Exchange) disclosure requirements
Shell, ExxonMobil (Jurong Island): Implementeren carbon capture at refineries
Banks (DBS, OCBC, UOB): Apply coal financing phase-out policies
Petrochemical companies: Investeren in green hydrogen and sustainable feedstocks
NEA: Accelerate koolstofbelasting escalation timeline
MAS: Versterken climate-related financial disclosure (TCFD alignment)
EMA (Energy Market Authority): Mandate hernieuwbare energie targets
Engage through available parlementair channels — Members of Parliament (93 elected, up to 12 non-constituency/nominated)
Support ASEAN milieu- cooperation frameworks
Pleiten via Singapore's Green Finance Action Plan for regional decarbonization
Aandringen op IMO shipping emissies standards (Singapore is world's largest bunkering port)
i: NEA (National Environment Agency) — milieu- regulator. MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) — financial regulator with expanding climate disclosure mandate. SGX — Singapore Exchange, requires climate reporting.
Jurong Island — Singapore's petrochemical hub hosting Shell, ExxonMobil, and other major refineries. DBS, OCBC, UOB — Singapore's three major banks with significant fossil fuel financing exposure.
EMA (Energy Market Authority) — energieregulator. Singapore Green Plan 2030 — national sustainability framework. Carbon tax administered by NEA under Carbon Pricing Act.

Parliament of Singapore — unicameral. Singapore is a parlementair republic with dominant-party governance (PAP — People's Action Party). Note: limited political pluralism in practice. International channels: ASEAN (founding member), IMO, UNFCCC.

SI.s: Small EU-lid economie ($73B BBP). Productie op 19.4% BBP. Diensten op 57.9%. Significant forest cover (60%+ of territory). EU-lid since 2004. Former Yugoslav republic with strong milieu- awareness.

sectors.w: Slovenia's intensive agriculture in lowland areas (Pomurje, Podravje) relies on monoculture grain and livestock. Wanneer soil and water quality data is linked to CAP payments, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: EU CAP eco-scheme implementation. Wanneer subsidy payments require biodiversity and soil health measures, het overlappende belang in exhaustive monoculture verzwakt.
Per-farm soil and water quality monitoring through ARSKTRP (Agency for Agricultural Markets and Rural Ontwikkelenment). Maakt W berekenbaar.

Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Grain monoculture and intensive livestock farming degrade soil and pollute groundwater. Organic farming and crop rotation reduce dependence — Slovenia already has 11%+ organic farming share.
a: Rapporteren aan ARSO (Agencija Republike Slovenije za okolje — Environment Agency)
Rapporteren aan Inšpektorat za kmetijstvo (Agricultural Inspectorate)

Državni zbor (National Assembly) — 90 members. Državni svet (National Council) — 40 members, advisory role. EU-lid since 2004. Alpine Convention member. Contact through dz-rs.si.

SK.s: Central European EU-lid ($140.9B BBP). Productie op 16.3% BBP — heavily auto-dependent (Volkswagen, Kia, Stellantis). Diensten op 60%. EU-lid since 2004. World's largest per-capita car producer.

bp: EU front-of-pack labeling (Nutri-Score or equivalent). Wanneer consumers can identify ultra-processing, het overlappende belang in opaque ingredient lists verzwakt.
Mandatory per-product health impact disclosure. Slovakia has rising obesity rates (20%+). Linking UPF consumption data to health outcomes makes W computable.
Niet breekbaar. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value and adds synthetic additives.

Ministry of Health — oversees dietary health policy. Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Ontwikkelenment — food production policy.
Národná rada Slovenskej republiky (National Council) — unicameral, 150 members. EU-lid since 2004. Contact through nrsr.sk.

SN.s: West African economie ($32.8B BBP). Landbouw op 16.6% BBP. Mining 2.9% (phosphates, gold, zircon). Offshore oil and gas discoveries (Sangomar field — first oil expected). Visserij crucial for food security. Democracy with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Senegal's fisheries face severe overbevissing by foreign industrial fleets (EU, China) competing with artisanal pirogues. Wanneer per-vessel catch data is published alongside stock assessments, W wordt berekenbaar.

VMS (Vessel Monitoring System) data publication and per-vessel catch reporting. Senegal has invested in MCS (Monitoring, Control and Surveillance). Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Industrial trawling damages benthic habitats. Artisanal fishing with selective gear reduces systeemafhankelijkheid.

Senegal's fisheries employ ~600,000 people. Artisanal pirogues (wooden boats) land ~80% of total catch. GAIPES — fish exporters association.
Ministry of Visserij and Maritime Economy. CRODT — oceanographic research center providing stock assessments. CSRP — sub-regional fisheries commission for West Africa.

Assemblée nationale du Sénégal — unicameral, 165 members. Senegal is a presidential republic with a strong democratic tradition (peaceful power transitions in 2000, 2012, 2024). Contact through assemblee-nationale.sn.

SO.s: Fragile state ($12B BBP). Limited economic data available. Bosinkomsten 11.24% BBP (charcoal — major ontbossing driver). Charcoal trade linked to Al-Shabaab financing. Ongoing conflict and state fragility.

sectors.w: Somalia's charcoal production devastates acacia forests and finances armed groups. Wanneer charcoal trade flows are traced and linked to ontbossing data, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: UN Security Council charcoal export ban enforcement (Resolution 2036). Wanneer the ban is effectively enforced, the overlappend belang between Al-Shabaab revenue and charcoal trade verzwakt.
Satellite ontbossing monitoring linked to charcoal trade routes. UN Monitoring Group has documented the flows. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Charcoal production from slow-growing acacia in arid Somali climate causes irreversible desertification.

Somali charcoal is primarily exported to Gulf states via dhow networks. UAE has been the largest market. Some companies are promoting LPG as an alternative cooking fuel.
Federal Government of Somalia — limited authority outside Mogadishu. Federal Member States have varying governance capacity. UN sancties framework provides the primary regulatory tool.

Federal Parliament of Somalia — bicameral: House of the People (275 members) and Upper House (54 members). Note: clan-based indirect elections, limited institutional capacity. International channels: UN, AU (ATMIS — AU Transition Mission in Somalia), IGAD.

SV.s: Small Central American economie ($35.4B BBP). Diensten op 61% BBP. Landbouw op 4.4%. Productie op 12%. Significant remittance dependence (~24% of BBP). Bitcoin adopted as legal tender (2021). State of exception since 2022.

sectors.w: El Salvador's sugarcane monoculture in coastal lowlands is linked to chronic kidney disease of unknown etiology (CKDu) among agricultural workers — one of the highest rates globally. Wanneer CKDu data is linked to agrochemical exposure per farm, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Agrochemical regulation and worker health monitoring. Wanneer sugarcane operations internalize CKDu health costs, het overlappende belang in unregulated pesticide/herbicide use verzwakt.
Per-farm agrochemical use and worker health outcome data. El Salvador has the world's highest CKDu mortality. Linking these datasets makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Sugarcane monoculture depletes soils and concentrates agrochemical exposure. Crop diversification and organic practices reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

El Salvador's sugar industry is concentrated among a few large ingenios (sugar mills). CAMAGRO (Cámara Agropecuaria y Agroindustrial) — agricultural industry chamber.
Ministry of Health — responsible for CKDu response. MARN — milieu- regulation.
Asamblea Legislativa — unicameral, 84 members. Note: since 2021, executive dominance over legislature; limited separation of powers in practice. International channels: SICA, PAHO, ILO.

SY.s: War-devastated economie ($23.6B BBP). Landbouw op 43.1% BBP — unusually high due to industrial collapse. Olie-inkomsten 4.02%, gas 2.33%. Civil war since 2011 has destroyed infrastructure. Ongoing political transition (2024-2025).

sectors.w: Syria's oil infrastructure has been contested between factions (SDF/AANES controls northeastern fields, former regime controlled refineries). Wanneer oil revenue flows are transparently traced through reconstruction, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Post-conflict transparent governance of oil revenues. Wanneer reconstruction frameworks require accountable revenue management, het overlappende belang in opaque extraction verzwakt.
Oil revenue flow transparantie as condition of reconstruction assistance and sancties relief. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Oil infrastructure has been extensively damaged — reconstruction offers opportunity to build in milieu- standards.

Note: Syria is undergoing political transition following the fall of the Assad regime (late 2024). New governance structures are forming. International channels: UN (Security Council, Special Envoy), Arab League (membership restored 2023), reconstruction donor conferences.

TD.s: Sahelian economie ($19.5B BBP). Olie-inkomsten 16.75% BBP. Landbouw op 37.7%. Bosinkomsten 4.58%. One of the world's poorest countries. Military transitional government. Lake Chad shrinking (~90% since 1960s).

sectors.w: Chad's oil revenues flow through an opaque pipeline (Doba basin to Kribi, Cameroon). The World Bank's original revenue transparantie mechanism (Collège de Contrôle) was dismantled. Wanneer oil revenue allocation is made transparent, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Restore oil revenue transparantie mechanisms. The World Bank's original Chad-Cameroon pipeline project required transparent revenue allocation — this was dismantled. Rebuilding it breaks het overlappende belang in opaque revenue flows.
Oil revenue flow disclosure through EITI. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023 for governance failures. Restoring compliance makes W computable.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Oil production in arid Sahel strains water resources. However, the Doba basin fields are maturing and production declining.

SHT — state oil company. Ministry of Petroleum, Mines and Energy — oversees hydrocarbons. Chad was suspended from EITI in 2023.

Note: Military transitional government (Conseil Militaire de Transition, succeeded by elected government of Mahamat Déby, 2024). Conseil National de Transition — 93 members, appointed. International channels: AU, Lake Chad Basin Commission, CEMAC.

TG.s: Small West African economie ($10.7B BBP). Landbouw op 21.3% BBP. Mining 4.88% (phosphates — world's 5th largest producer). Diensten op 49.2%. Key transit port (Lomé). Governance concerns with limited political competition.

sectors.w: Togo's phosphate mijnbouw (SNPT — Société Nouvelle des Phosphates du Togo) generates cadmium-contaminated waste. Wanneer per mijn milieu- data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.

Per-mine milieu- monitoring data including cadmium levels, water contamination, and land rehabilitation. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Phosphate rock contains cadmium. Cadmium removal technology exists and is commercially viable.

Ministry of Mines and Energy — mijnbouw oversight. ANGE — milieu- assessment authority.

Assemblée nationale du Togo — 113 members. Note: Togo has been governed by the Gnassingbé family since 1967; limited political competition. Constitutional change in 2024 shifted to parlementair system. International channels: ECOWAS, AU, EITI.

TH.s: Major Southeast Asian economie ($526.5B BBP). Productie op 24.3% BBP (automotive, electronics, food processing). Landbouw op 8.7%. Diensten op 59.2%. World's largest rice exporter. Significant petrochemical sector. Constitutional monarchy.

sectors.w: Thailand is a major UPF producer and exporter (CP Group — Charoen Pokphand — is one of Asia's largest food conglomerates). Wanneer per-product health impact data is linked to marketing and formulation, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Front-of-pack labeling reform. Thailand's existing traffic-light label (GDA) covers some nutrients — extending to ultra-processing indicators verzwakt het overlappende belang in opaque formulation.
Per-product health outcome correlation data. Thailand's rising obesity and diabetes rates can be linked to UPF consumption patterns. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Ultra-processing by definition strips nutritional value.

i: Thai FDA — regulates food safety and labeling. ThaiHealth (สำนักงานกองทุนสนับสนุนการสร้างเสริมสุขภาพ) — independent health promotion agency funded by a 2% surcharge on tobacco and alcohol taxes.
CP Group — one of the world's largest agri-food conglomerates. Thai Union — global seafood company (owner of Chicken of the Sea). Thai Beverage (ThaiBev) — major food and beverage company.
Ministry of Public Health — health policy. Thai FDA — food regulation. Thailand's sugar tax (2017) is one of the region's most progressive.

รัฐสภา (National Assembly) — bicameral: สภาผู้แทนราษฎร (House of Representatives, 500 members) and วุฒิสภา (Senate, 200 members). Thailand is a constitutionele monarchie. Recent democratic restoration (2023 elections).

TJ.s: Poorest Central Asian economie ($14.2B BBP). Mining 7.09% BBP (gold, silver, antimony). Landbouw op 19.7%. Aluminum smelting (TALCO). Remittance-dependent (~30% of BBP from Russia). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Tajikistan's mijnbouw sector includes artisanal gold mijnbouw with mercury use and the TALCO aluminum smelter (one of Central Asia's largest polluters). Wanneer per-facility emissies and milieu- data are published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: International buyer due diligence on Tajik mineral exports. Wanneer aluminum and gold buyers require milieu- compliance verification, het overlappende belang in unregulated production verzwakt.
Per-facility milieu- monitoring data. TALCO's fluoride emissies and gold mijnbouw mercury contamination can be measured and disclosed. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. TALCO smelter emissies can be reduced with modern pot-lining and scrubbing technology. Mercury-free gold processing exists.

Committee for Environmental Protection under the Government — milieu- regulator. Ministry of Industry and New Technologies — industrial oversight.
Majlisi Oli (Parliament) — bicameral: Majlisi Namoyandagon (lower, 63 members) and Majlisi Milli (upper, 33 members). Note: effectively eenpartijstaat (PDPT). International channels: OSCE, SCO, EITI.

TM.s: Gas-dependent closed economie ($51.4B BBP). Productie op 18% BBP. One of the world's most autoritair states. Massive gas reserves (Galkynysh — world's 2nd largest gas field). Data extremely limited — World Bank reports zeros for many indicators due to government opacity.

sectors.w: Turkmenistan is one of the world's largest methane emitters — satellite monitoring (Sentinel-5P, MethaneSAT) has revealed massive methane leaks from gas infrastructure. Wanneer methane data is published, W wordt berekenbaar despite government opacity.
bp: Satellite-based methane monitoring bypasses government opacity. Wanneer buyers (China — CNPC pipeline) face pressure to account for upstream methane, het overlappende belang in unmonitored gas production verzwakt.
Satellite methane emission monitoring (UNEP's IMEO — International Methane Emissions Observatory — has flagged Turkmenistan). Maakt W berekenbaar without government cooperation.
Niet breekbaar. Gas production and transport inherently leak methane, a greenhouse gas 80× more potent than CO₂ over 20 years.

Türkmengaz — state gas company. Türkmennebit — state oil company. CNPC — operates the Central Asia-China gas pipeline (Turkmenistan is the primary source). No independent corporate governance exists.
No independent domestic regulation exists. International monitoring provides the only oversight: UNEP IMEO, IEA Methane Tracker, satellite platforms (MethaneSAT, Sentinel-5P).

Mejlis (Parliament) — 125 members. Turkmenistan is an autoritair state — the legislature has no independent function. International channels: UN (UNEP, OHCHR), OSCE, CIS. Turkmenistan maintains permanent neutrality status (UN-recognized since 1995).

TN.s: North African economie ($51.3B BBP). Landbouw op 9.7% BBP. Olie-inkomsten 1.55%. Productie op 14.8%. Diensten op 62.6%. Birthplace of the Arab Spring (2011). Governance backsliding since 2021 presidential power consolidation.

sectors.w: Tunisia's oil and gas production is modest but state oil company ETAP's revenue flows lack transparantie. Wanneer per veld milieu- and revenue data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: EITI-aligned revenue transparantie. Tunisia's oil revenues are small relative to BBP but significant for the state budget. Transparent allocation breaks het overlappende belang in opaque revenue management.
Per-field milieu- monitoring and revenue flow disclosure. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Tunisia's mature fields are declining. Solar energy potential is enormous (Saharan irradiance) and can reduce hydrocarbon dependence.

ETAP — state oil company. ENI (Italy), OMV (Austria) — major international operators in Tunisia. Tunisia's South Energy Transition Program targets renewable expansion.
Ministry of Industry, Mines and Energy — hydrocarbons oversight. ANME — energy efficiency and hernieuwbare energie agency.

Assemblée des Représentants du Peuple — unicameral, 161 members. Note: since 2021, presidential power consolidation has weakened legislative independence. International channels: Arab League, AU, Union for the Mediterranean.

TR.s: Major middle-income economie ($1,359.1B BBP). Productie op 16.8% BBP. Diensten op 57.5%. NATO member. Mining 0.63%. Landbouw op 5.8%. Significant coal dependence for electricity. G20 member.

sectors.w: Türkiye is expanding coal capacity (including imported coal plants) despite having excellent renewable potential. Wanneer coal plant health costs are internalized, het overlappende belang in cheap coal power breaks.
bp: Carbon pricing or coal plant emission standards aligned with EU CBAM (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism). Türkiye's EU customs union makes CBAM relevant to industrial exports. Wanneer coal costs include carbon, renewables are cheaper.
Per-plant emissies and health cost data. Türkiye's coal plants are concentrated near population centers. HEAL and local NGOs have documented health costs. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.

EÜAŞ — state electricity generation company. Significant private coal generation. Türkiye's 2053 net-zero target implies eventual coal phase-out but no timeline exists.
EPDK — energy market regulator. Türkiye ratified the Paris Agreement in 2021. EU Customs Union makes CBAM compliance relevant for Turkish industrial exports.

TBMM (Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi — Grand National Assembly) — unicameral, 600 members. Contact through tbmm.gov.tr. Türkiye is a presidential republic, NATO member, G20 member, EU customs union partner.

TT.s: Caribbean energy economie ($25.6B BBP). Gasinkomsten 5.09%, oil rents 2.71% BBP. Major petrochemical and LNG producer (Atlantic LNG). Productie op 14.4%. Diensten op 59.2%. Parliamentary democratie.

sectors.w: Trinidad's petrochemical industry faces maturing gas fields and declining production. As reserves deplete and global LNG competition increases, het overlappende belang in fossil fuel dependence verzwakt naturally.
bp: Declining natural gas reserves force economic diversification. Wanneer production costs rise on mature fields, het overlappende belang in fossil fuel dependence verzwakt as alternative revenue sources become necessary.
Per-facility emissies and milieu- monitoring at Point Lisas industrial estate and Atlantic LNG. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. LNG and petrochemical processing emit CO₂ and other pollutants.
a: Rapporteren aan EMA (Environmental Management Authority)
Rapporteren aan MEEI (Ministry of Energy and Energy Industries)
Documenteren via Fishermen and Friends of the Sea (milieu- NGO)
NGC (National Gas Company): Ontwikkelen gas-to-renewables transition plan
Atlantic LNG: Implementeren carbon capture at liquefaction facility
Petrochemical companies (Methanex, Nutrien): Reduce process emissies

MEEI: Ontwikkelen hernieuwbare energie framework

Support CARICOM energy transition framework
Pleiten via Alliance of Small Island States (AOSIS) for climate finance
Aandringen op IMO shipping emission standards (Trinidad is a major bunkering port)
i: EMA — the Environmental Management Authority, established under the Environmental Management Act 2000. Fishermen and Friends of the Sea — Trinidad's most active milieu- NGO.
NGC (National Gas Company of Trinidad and Tobago) — state gas company. Atlantic LNG — joint venture (Shell, BP, NGC). Point Lisas Industrial Estate — petrochemical complex.
MEEI — energy ministry. RIC — utilities regulator. Trinidad has extremely low domestic energy prices (subsidized), discouraging efficiency.
Parliament of Trinidad and Tobago — bicameral: House of Representatives (41 members) and Senate (31 members). Parliamentary democratie with competitive elections. Contact through ttparliament.org.

TZ.s: East African economie ($78.8B BBP). Landbouw op 23.3% BBP. Mining 4.03% (gold, tanzanite — found only in Tanzania). Bosinkomsten 2.39%. Gas reserves (offshore). Diensten op 29.6%. Growing economie with improving governance.

sectors.w: Tanzania's gold mijnbouw (Barrick/Twiga Minerals, AngloGold Ashanti) generates tailings and mercury contamination (artisanal sector). Wanneer per mijn milieu- data is published alongside revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Mining Act 2017 local content and transparantie requirements. Wanneer enforced alongside milieu- monitoring, het overlappende belang in opaque extraction verzwakt.
Per-mine milieu- monitoring data through TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative). Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mercury-free artisanal mijnbouw and improved tailings management reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.

Rapporteren aan Mining Commission
Documenteren via LEAT (Lawyers' Environmental Action Team)

Support EITI enhanced reporting with milieu- data
Pleiten via EAC for regional mijnbouw milieu- standards
Aandringen op Minamata Convention enforcement on mercury in artisanal mijnbouw
i: NEMC — milieuautoriteit. Mining Commission — mijnbouw sector regulator. LEAT — Tanzanian milieu- law NGO. HakiRasilimali (Publish What You Pay Tanzania) — revenue transparantie advocacy.

Twiga Minerals — 50/50 joint venture between Barrick Gold and Government of Tanzania (created after 2017 tax dispute). Geita Gold Mine — AngloGold Ashanti operation. STAMICO (State Mining Corporation) — government mijnbouw entity.
Mining Commission — established under Mining Act 2017. TEITI (Tanzania Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member since 2009.

Bunge la Tanzania (National Assembly) — unicameral, 393 members. Tanzania is a presidential republic with increasing political openness under current administration. Contact through bunge.go.tz. EAC (East African Community) member.

UA.s: War-affected economie ($190.7B BBP). Mining 5.32% BBP. Militaire uitgaven 34.48% BBP (wartime). Landbouw op 7.1%. Coal 0.34%. EU-kandidaat country (2022). Under Russian invasion since February 2022. Massive milieu- damage from war.

sectors.w: Ukraine's mijnbouw sector (iron ore, manganese, titanium) has suffered massive milieu- damage from the Russian invasion — flooded mines, destroyed infrastructure, contaminated land. Post-war reconstruction offers opportunity for transparent milieu- standards. Wanneer reconstruction milieu- data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: EU accession conditionality requiring milieu- standards in post-war reconstruction. Wanneer reconstruction adheres to EU milieu- acquis, het overlappende belang in rapid but dirty rebuilding verzwakt.
Environmental damage assessment and remediation tracking. Ukraine's Ministry of Environmental Protection is already documenting war damage with international support. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Mining inherently disturbs landscapes, but post-war reconstruction can implement best-practice tailings management and water treatment from the start.
a: Rapporteren aan Derzhekoinspektsiia (State Environmental Inspectorate)
Documenteren via OSCE milieu- monitoring
Report war-related milieu- damage through Ukraine's Ecodozor platform
Metinvest (Akhmetov): Implementeren EU-aligned milieu- standards in reconstruction
ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih: Apply global milieu- standards
Reconstruction companies: Aannemen green building and milieu- remediation standards
Ministry of Environmental Protection: Handhaven milieu- standards in reconstruction
State Subsoil Service: Hervormen mijnbouw licensing with milieu- conditions
EU pre-accession assistance: Support milieu- governance capacity building
Neem contact op met uw Narodnyi deputat in the Verkhovna Rada (450 members) om te eisen milieu- standards in reconstruction legislation
Support Ukraine Recovery Conference milieu- commitments
Pleiten via EU accession process for milieu- chapter prioritization
Aandringen op international milieu- damage assessment and Russian liability for war-related milieu- destruction
i: Derzhekoinspektsiia — State Environmental Inspectorate. Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources — documents war-related milieu- damage. Ecodozor — citizen reporting platform.
Metinvest — Ukraine's largest steel and mijnbouw group (Rinat Akhmetov). ArcelorMittal Kryvyi Rih — major steel producer. Ferrexpo — iron ore pellet producer.
Ministry of Environmental Protection and Natural Resources. State Subsoil Service (Derzhgeonadra) — mijnbouw licensing. Ukraine's EU candidacy requires milieu- acquis alignment.

Verkhovna Rada — unicameral, 450 members. Contact through rada.gov.ua. EU-kandidaat country since 2022. International channels: EU accession process, Ukraine Recovery Conference, International Criminal Court (milieu- damage documentation).

UG.s: East African economie ($53.9B BBP). Landbouw op 24.6% BBP. Bosinkomsten 7.48% (one of the highest in the dataset). Oil production beginning (Tilenga and Kingfisher projects, EACOP pipeline). Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Uganda's new oil projects (TotalEnergies' Tilenga and CNOOC's Kingfisher, plus EACOP — East African Crude Oil Pipeline) face massive international scrutiny. Wanneer project-level milieu- data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: International ESG pressure on project financiers. Wanneer banks and insurers withdraw from EACOP financing, het overlappende belang in unscrutinized pipeline construction verzwakt. Several major banks have already declined.
Per-project milieu- impact data for Tilenga (in Murchison Falls National Park), Kingfisher, and EACOP. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Crude oil production and 1,443-km heated pipeline through sensitive ecosystems inherently create milieu- risk.
a: Rapporteren aan NEMA (National Environment Management Authority)
Documenteren via international milieu- organizations (350.org, BankTrack)
Report through TotalEnergies compliance channels

CNOOC Uganda: Aannemen international milieu- standards for Kingfisher

NEMA: Versterken milieu- monitoring of oil projects

Support international ESG pressure on EACOP project financing

Aandringen op EITI membership with milieu- disclosure
Support East African Court of Justice jurisdiction on transboundary milieu- issues
i: NEMA — milieuautoriteit. Note: Ugandan milieu- activists have faced government harassment. International channels are safer: 350.org has led the #StopEACOP campaign. BankTrack monitors EACOP financing.

TotalEnergies — operator of Tilenga project and EACOP. CNOOC Uganda — operates Kingfisher project. EACOP (East African Crude Oil Pipeline) — 1,443 km from Hoima to Tanga (Tanzania). UNOC (Uganda National Oil Company) — state oil company.
PAU — petroleum sector regulator. MEMD — energy and mineral development ministry. Uganda's Petroleum Revenue Management policy is under development.

Parliament of Uganda — unicameral, 529 members. Note: Uganda is effectively under one-party dominant governance (NRM). International channels: EAC (East African Community), African Court on Human and Peoples' Rights, European Parliament (regarding EU-headquartered companies like TotalEnergies).

UY.s: Small South American economie ($81B BBP). Landbouw op 6.4% BBP. Diensten op 65.3%. Bosinkomsten 1.91%. Generates nearly 100% of electricity from renewables (wind, hydro, solar, biomass). Strong democratie — one of Latin America's most stable.

sectors.w: Uruguay's soy and eucalyptus monoculture expansion is degrading soils and displacing native grasslands (campos). Wanneer soil health and biodiversity data is linked to agricultural production per department, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: National soil conservation plan enforcement. Uruguay's Ley de Uso y Conservación de Suelos (Soil Use and Conservation Law) requires mandatory soil plans — strengthening enforcement breaks het overlappende belang in soil-exhaustive monoculture.
Per-farm soil erosion and grassland conversion monitoring. MGAP already requires Plan de Uso y Manejo de Suelos for farms >50 ha. Publishing compliance data makes W computable.

Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Soy monoculture and eucalyptus plantations degrade native grassland ecosystems. Integrated crop-livestock systems and native grassland preservation reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.
a: Rapporteren aan DINAMA (Dirección Nacional de Medio Ambiente)
Rapporteren aan RENARE (Dirección General de Recursos Naturales Renovables)
Documenteren via Vida Silvestre Uruguay
Large agricultural companies: Versterken soil conservation plan compliance

Meat exporters: Aannemen pasture-based certification
MGAP (Ministerio de Ganadería, Agricultura y Pesca): Handhaven mandatory soil plans
DINAMA: Versterken milieu- assessment for land-use change
INIA (Instituto Nacional de Investigación Agropecuaria): Publish soil health monitoring data

Support Mercosur milieu- cooperation frameworks
Advocate for native grassland (campos) conservation in international biodiversity frameworks
Aandringen op soil carbon accounting in climate commitments
i: DINAMA — national environment directorate. RENARE — renewable natural resources directorate under MGAP. Vida Silvestre Uruguay — biodiversity conservation organization.
UPM (Finnish company) — major eucalyptus plantation and pulp mill operator. Montes del Plata (UPM/Arauco) — forestry. Large-scale soy farming often by Brazilian/Argentine operators.
MGAP — agriculture, livestock and fisheries ministry. INIA — national agricultural research institute.
Asamblea General — bicameral: Cámara de Representantes (99 members) and Cámara de Senadores (30 members). Contact through parlamento.gub.uy. Uruguay is one of Latin America's strongest democracies.

UZ.s: Central Asian economie ($115B BBP). Gasinkomsten 11.04% BBP. Mining 8.5% (gold — Muruntau is world's largest open-pit gold mine, uranium). Landbouw op 18.3%. Productie op 20.2%. Post-Karimov liberalization (since 2016).

sectors.w: Uzbekistan's gas sector (Uzbekneftegaz) consumes most production domestically at heavily subsidized prices, encouraging waste. Wanneer per veld production and domestic consumption data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Gas price reform eliminating subsidies that encourage wasteful consumption. Wanneer domestic gas prices reflect market value, het overlappende belang in underpriced energy verzwakt.
Per-field production, distribution, and consumption data. Uzbekistan has begun EITI implementation. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Gas combustion emits CO₂. However, Uzbekistan's enormous solar potential (300+ sunny days/year) can displace gas in electricity generation.

Report through EITI Uzbekistan channels

Reduce methane leakage from gas infrastructure

Support EITI enhanced reporting with milieu- data
Pleiten via EBRD and ADB for gas price reform conditionality
Aandringen op Aral Sea milieu- restoration international cooperation
i: State Committee for Ecology and Environmental Protection (Goskomekologiya) — milieu- regulator. EITI Uzbekistan — Uzbekistan became an EITI member in 2021.
Uzbekneftegaz — state gas company. NMMC (Navoi Mining and Metallurgical Company) — operates Muruntau gold mine (world's largest open-pit) and uranium mines. Almalyk MMC — copper and gold mijnbouw.
Ministry of Energy — energy policy. Goskomekologiya — milieu- regulation. Uzbekistan has been implementing significant economic reforms since 2016.

Oliy Majlis — bicameral: Legislative Chamber (Qonunchilik palatasi, 150 members) and Senate, 100 members. Note: limited political pluralism. International channels: EITI, EBRD, ADB, SCO. Aral Sea milieu- disaster requires international cooperation.

VE.s: Oil-dependent economie in crisis ($119.8B BBP — severely contracted from peak). World's largest proven oil reserves. Economic data largely unavailable (World Bank reports zeros for most indicators). Hyperinflation, mass emigration. Authoritarian governance.

sectors.w: Venezuela's oil industry has collapsed from ~3.3M bpd (1990s) to ~700K bpd due to mismanagement, underinvestment, and sancties. The overlappend belang is already weakened by operational failure.
bp: Production collapse has already weakened the overlappend belang — PDVSA lacks the capital and technical capacity to maintain production. Sanctions further constrain revenue.
Oil revenue transparantie is impossible under current governance opacity. However, international sancties monitoring (OFAC designations) provides partial W computability.
Niet breekbaar. Oil extraction and refining emit CO₂. Venezuela's heavy crude (Orinoco Belt) is particularly emissies-intensive to process.
a: Report through international channels (Transparencia Venezuela, PROVEA)
Documenteren via exile media and research organizations
Provide data to international sancties enforcement authorities

Aandringen op PDVSA operational and milieu- transparantie as condition of sancties relief
Support post-transition EITI membership planning
i: Note: No independent domestic institutions exist. Transparencia Venezuela — anti-corruption NGO. PROVEA — Venezuelan human rights organization. Operating environment is extremely hostile to maatschappelijk middenveld.
PDVSA (Petróleos de Venezuela, S.A.) — state oil company, severely degraded operationally. Chevron — received limited US OFAC license to operate. Repsol, ENI — maintain limited presence.

No independent domestic regulation exists. OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control, US Treasury) — administers Venezuela sancties. EU — maintains sancties. PDVSA is both regulator and operator — no separation exists.

Asamblea Nacional — 277 members. Note: Venezuela's institutions lack independence under current governance. International channels: OAS (Venezuela withdrawn/suspended), International Contact Group, ICC preliminary examination, Lima Group (reduced activity).

VN.s: Fast-growing economie ($476.4B BBP). Productie op 24.4% BBP. Landbouw op 11.9%. Koleninkomsten 0.38%. Oil 0.67%. Bosinkomsten 1.07%. Major electronics and textile manufacturing hub. One-party state (Communist Party).

sectors.w: Viet Nam is rapidly expanding coal power capacity despite excellent renewable potential (solar, wind, offshore wind). JETP (Just Energy Transition Partnership) funding ($15.5B pledged) creates leverage to shift the overlappend belang away from coal.
bp: JETP implementation — $15.5B pledged by international partners for coal-to-renewables transition. Wanneer JETP funding makes renewables cheaper than new coal, het overlappende belang in coal expansion breaks.
Per-plant emissies and health cost data. Viet Nam's coal plants are concentrated in the north (Quảng Ninh) and south (Bình Thuận). Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.

Documenteren via VUSTA (Viet Nam Union of Science and Technology Associations)
Report through international development partner channels (World Bank, ADB)

i: MONRE — environment and natural resources ministry. VUSTA — umbrella organization for Vietnamese maatschappelijk middenveld (within party framework). Note: independent maatschappelijk middenveld is not permitted in Viet Nam's one-party system.

EVN (Tập đoàn Điện lực Việt Nam) — state electricity utility. PVN (PetroVietnam) — state oil and gas company. TKV (Vinacomin — Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Than - Khoáng sản Việt Nam) — state coal mijnbouw company.

MOIT — energy and industrial policy. PDP VIII (Power Ontwikkelenment Plan VIII, approved 2023) — sets hernieuwbare energie targets. JETP — Just Energy Transition Partnership ($15.5B pledged by IPG partners including US, EU, UK, Japan).

Quốc hội (National Assembly) — unicameral, 500 members. Viet Nam is a eenpartijstaat (Communist Party). JETP International Partners Group provides the primary leverage mechanism. International channels: ASEAN, World Bank, ADB, JETP IPG.

XK.s: Small Western Balkan economie ($11.2B BBP). Productie op 12.6%. Koleninkomsten 0.38%. Mining 0.55%. Landbouw op 7.3%. Youngest population in Europe. EU-kandidaat status pending. Two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A and B) supply ~95% of electricity.

sectors.w: Kosovo's near-total dependence on two aging lignite plants (Kosovo A — one of Europe's worst polluters — and Kosovo B) faces EU accession conditionality and enormous health costs.
bp: EU accession pathway requiring IED/LCPD compliance. Kosovo A is scheduled for decommissioning. Wanneer milieu- compliance costs are applied, new renewables are cheaper than coal retrofit.
Per-plant emissies and health cost data. Kosovo A and B cause severe air pollution in Pristina — among Europe's worst air quality. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Lignite combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂.

Documenteren via INDEP or GAP Institute (Kosovo think tanks)
Report through KEK compliance channels

Implementeren just transition plans for Obiliq/Kastriot mijnbouw communities

MMPH (Ministry of Environment): Handhaven emission standards

Support EU integration benchmarks on milieu- standards
Pleiten via Energy Community for just transition support
Aandringen op World Bank and EBRD financing of hernieuwbare energie replacement
i: AMMK — milieu- protection agency. INDEP (Institute for Ontwikkelenment Policy) — research and advocacy. GAP Institute — Kosovo public policy think tank.
KEK — Kosovo Energy Corporation, staatsbedrijf, operates Kosovo A (5 units, 800 MW, built 1962-1975) and Kosovo B (2 units, 678 MW, built 1983-1984). KOSTT — transmission system operator.
ERO — energieregulator. MMPH (Ministria e Mjedisit, Planifikimit Hapësinor dhe Infrastrukturës) — environment ministry. Kosovo is an Energy Community Treaty member.

Kuvendi i Kosovës (Assembly of Kosovo) — unicameral, 120 members. Contact through kuvendikosoves.org. Kosovo declared independence in 2008 (recognized by ~100 UN members). Energy Community Treaty member.

ZA.s: Largest sub-Saharan economie ($401.1B BBP). Koleninkomsten 2.44% BBP. Mining 3.83% (gold, platinum group metals, chrome, manganese). Productie op 12.8%. Diensten op 63%. Constitutional democratie. Severe electricity crisis (load shedding).

sectors.w: South Africa generates ~80% of electricity from coal (Eskom's aging fleet). JETP funding ($8.5B pledged) and Eskom's operational crisis (load shedding) create dual pressure. Wanneer coal plant health costs are internalized, the overlappend belang breaks.
bp: JETP implementation and Eskom restructuring. $8.5B pledged for coal-to-renewables transition. Wanneer renewable IPPs are cheaper and more reliable than aging coal plants, het overlappende belang in coal dependence breaks.

Per-plant emissies, health costs, and reliability data. Eskom's coal fleet is extensively documented — multiple plants fail to meet South Africa's own emission standards (granted repeated postponements). Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, mercury, and CO₂. South Africa's coal is high-ash content, exacerbating particulate emissies.
a: Rapporteren aan DFFE (Department of Forestry, Visserij and the Environment)
Report through groundWork or Centre for Environmental Rights
Documenteren via Public Protector complaints

DMRE (Department of Mineral Resources and Energy): Accelerate IRP 2019 renewable targets

Support JETP implementation and accountability mechanisms
Pleiten via BRICS for just energy transition principles
Aandringen op climate finance delivery through Green Climate Fund
i: DFFE — the environment department. groundWork — South African milieu- justice organization. Centre for Environmental Rights — public interest milieu- law organization. Life After Coal campaign — coalition challenging Eskom's coal dependence.

Eskom — state electricity utility, operates 15 coal-fired power stations. Exxaro Resources — coal mijnbouw. Thungela Resources — thermal coal (spun off from Anglo American). Seriti Resources — coal mijnbouw. REIPPPP (Renewable Energy Independent Power Producer Procurement Programme) — auction program.

NERSA — energieregulator. DMRE — mineral resources and energy department. IRP 2019 (Integrated Resource Plan) — South Africa's electricity plan. JETP Investment Plan — guides $8.5B transition funding.

Parliament of South Africa — bicameral: National Assembly (400 members) and National Council of Provinces (90 members). Contact through parliament.gov.za. South Africa is a constitutional democratie, G20 member, BRICS member. JETP International Partners Group: France, Germany, UK, US, EU.

ZM.s: Southern African economie ($25.3B BBP). Mining 28.25% BBP — one of the highest mijnbouw dependencies globally (copper). Bosinkomsten 6.78%. Diensten op 57.2%. Africa's second-largest copper producer. Democratic governance with peaceful power transitions.

sectors.w: Zambia's copper mijnbouw generates acid mine drainage and SO₂ from smelting (Mopani, KCM — historically among Africa's worst polluters). Wanneer per mijn milieu- data is published, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: Mining royalty reform with milieu- earmarking. Wanneer mijnbouw revenue is partly allocated to milieu- remediation, het overlappende belang in externalizing pollution costs verzwakt.
Per-mine milieu- monitoring data through ZEITI and ZEMA. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Copper smelting emissies can be reduced with modern sulfuric acid capture technology. Mopani smelter upgrade demonstrates this.
a: Rapporteren aan ZEMA (Zambia Environmental Management Agency)
Documenteren via community organizations in Copperbelt Province
Report through mijnbouw company compliance channels

Barrick Gold (Lumwana): Aannemen enhanced tailings management
ZCCM-IH (state mijnbouw holding): Require milieu- compliance from partners
ZEMA: Handhaven emission standards for copper smelters
Ministry of Mines: Versterken milieu- conditions in mijnbouw licenses
ZEITI: Expand to include milieu- data
Neem contact op met uw Member of Parliament in the National Assembly (156 members) om te eisen milieu- enforcement on the Copperbelt
Support EITI enhanced reporting with milieu- data
Pleiten via SADC for regional mijnbouw milieu- standards
Aandringen op responsible mineral supply chain standards (copper is critical for energy transition)
i: ZEMA — milieu- management agency. Copperbelt communities have suffered decades of SO₂ and heavy metal pollution — documented by multiple studies and legal cases (e.g., Vedanta/KCM litigation in UK courts).

First Quantum Minerals — operates Kansanshi (one of Africa's largest copper mines) and Sentinel mines. Barrick Gold — operates Lumwana copper mine. Mopani Copper Mines — majority owned by ZCCM-IH after Glencore divestment. KCM (Konkola Copper Mines) — under provisional liquidation.
Ministry of Mines and Minerals Ontwikkelenment. ZEITI (Zambia Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative) — EITI member. Mining Cadastre Department — licensing authority.

National Assembly of Zambia — unicameral, 156 elected members + 8 nominated. Contact through parliament.gov.zm. Zambia is a presidential republic with competitive elections (peaceful transitions in 1991, 2011, 2021). SADC (Southern African Ontwikkelenment Community) member.

ZW.s: Southern African economie ($41.5B BBP). Mining 4.24% BBP (platinum group metals, gold, lithium, diamonds). Landbouw op 8.7%. Productie op 15.6%. Bosinkomsten 1.82%. Governance concerns. Major lithium reserves (Bikita, Arcadia).

sectors.w: Zimbabwe's mijnbouw sector is expanding rapidly (lithium — critical for EV batteries — and PGMs). Wanneer per mijn milieu- data is published alongside revenue, W wordt berekenbaar.
bp: International supply chain due diligence for critical minerals (lithium for EU Battery Regulation compliance). Wanneer EU buyers require milieu- verification, het overlappende belang in unregulated extraction verzwakt.
Per-mine milieu- monitoring through ZEITI (Zimbabwe applied for EITI candidacy). Maakt W berekenbaar.
Gedeeltelijk breekbaar. Lithium mijnbouw (hard-rock) generates waste rock and uses water. Best-practice processing and water recycling reduce systeemafhankelijkheid.
a: Rapporteren aan EMA (Environmental Management Agency)
Documenteren via ZELA (Zimbabwe Environmental Law Association)
Report through international mijnbouw company compliance channels
Zimplats (Impala Platinum): Implementeren international milieu- standards

i: EMA — milieu- management agency. ZELA — milieu- law organization. Note: maatschappelijk middenveld space is constrained in Zimbabwe.

Zimplats — Zimbabwe's largest PGM producer (Impala Platinum subsidiary). Bikita Minerals — lithium mijnbouw (Sinomine Resources acquired). Arcadia Lithium — major lithium deposit (Zhejiang Huayou Cobalt acquired). Caledonia Mining — gold.
Ministry of Mines and Mining Ontwikkelenment. EMA — milieu- regulation. ZMDC — state mijnbouw company. Zimbabwe's Mines and Minerals Act governs the sector.

Parliament of Zimbabwe — bicameral: National Assembly (270 members) and Senate (80 members). Note: ZANU-PF dominance limits effective legislative oversight. International channels: SADC, AU, EITI (Zimbabwe has expressed interest in joining).

CN.s: World's second-largest economie ($18,743.8B BBP). Productie op 24.9% BBP — global factory floor. Koleninkomsten 0.61%. Industrie op 36.5%. Diensten op 56.7%. One-party state (CPC). World's largest CO₂ emitter. Rapid renewable deployment alongside continued coal expansion.

sectors.w: China operates ~1,100 GW of coal capacity — more than the rest of the world combined. However, China also deploys more hernieuwbare energie annually than any other country. Wanneer renewable deployment makes new coal uneconomic, het overlappende belang in coal expansion breaks.
bp: Renewable energy cost competitiveness — China's solar and wind are already cheaper than new coal in most provinces. Wanneer existing coal plants become more expensive to run than new renewables, the overlappend belang breaks. This is already happening in eastern provinces.
Per-plant emissies data. China's national ETS (launched 2021) covers ~4.5 billion tonnes CO₂. Expanding coverage from electricity to industry sectors makes W computable.
Niet breekbaar. Coal combustion releases CO₂, SO₂, PM2.5, and mercury by chemistry.
a: Rapporteren aan MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment, 生态环境部)
Report through provincial milieu- protection bureaus

State energy companies (CHN Energy, Huaneng, Datang, Huadian, SPIC): Accelerate coal-to-renewables transition
Reduce new coal plant approvals
Investeren in grid-scale storage to enable renewable integration
NEA (National Energy Administration, 国家能源局): Limit new coal approvals to replace-and-retire
MEE: Accelerate national ETS coverage expansion to cement, steel, aluminum
NDRC: Align electricity market reform with carbon reduction targets

Aandringen op national ETS carbon price to rise above marginal abatement cost
Support technology cooperation on CCS and grid-scale storage
i: MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) — central milieuautoriteit. 12369 hotline — milieu- complaint system receiving millions of reports annually. Provincial Environmental Protection Bureaus — local enforcement. IPE (Institute of Public & Environmental Affairs, 公众环境研究中心) — Ma Jun's NGO providing corporate milieu- data.

China's 'Big Five' power generators: CHN Energy (国家能源集团), China Huaneng (华能), China Datang (大唐), China Huadian (华电), SPIC (国家电投). All staatsbedrijf, collectively operating most coal capacity. Also rapidly scaling renewables.

NEA (National Energy Administration) — energy planning and regulation. NDRC (National Ontwikkelenment and Hervormen Commission, 国家发展和改革委员会) — economic planning, sets electricity prices. National ETS — world's largest carbon market by coverage (power sector).

National People's Congress (全国人民代表大会) — ~3,000 members. China is a eenpartijstaat — the NPC does not function as an independent legislature. International channels: US-China climate bilateral, COP/UNFCCC, G20. China's dual carbon targets: peak CO₂ before 2030, carbon neutrality by 2060.

KR.s: Advanced economie ($1,875.4B BBP). Productie op 26.6% BBP (semiconductors, automobiles, shipbuilding, petrochemicals). Diensten op 57.5%. Heavy energy import dependence. Fourth-largest coal importer globally. G20 member. Vibrant democratie.

sectors.w: South Korea operates ~37 GW of coal capacity and is the world's 4th-largest coal importer. The 10th Basic Plan for Electricity Supply and Demand targets coal phase-down. Wanneer carbon pricing (K-ETS) makes coal uncompetitive versus LNG and renewables, the overlappend belang breaks.
bp: K-ETS (Korea Emissions Trading Scheme) carbon price escalation. Wanneer carbon costs make coal-fired generation more expensive than LNG and renewables, het overlappende belang in coal dependence breaks.
Per-plant emissies and health cost data. Korea Environment Institute and Korean medical associations have documented coal plant health impacts. Maakt W berekenbaar.
Niet breekbaar. Coal combustion releases SO₂, PM2.5, and CO₂.
a: Rapporteren aan Ministry of Environment (환경부)
Documenteren via KFEM (Korean Federation for Environmental Movements, 환경운동연합)

POSCO: Scale hydrogen-based steelmaking (HyREX)
Samsung, SK, Hyundai: Expand renewable electricity procurement (RE100 commitments)
MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy, 산업통상자원부): Accelerate coal retirement in Basic Electricity Plan

Aandringen op G20 commitment to end international coal financing (South Korea pledged to end overseas coal finance in 2021)
i: Ministry of Environment (환경부) — milieuautoriteit. KFEM (환경운동연합) — South Korea's largest milieu- NGO. Solutions for Our Climate (기후솔루션) — climate policy advocacy organization.
KEPCO — state electricity company (subsidiary gencos operate coal plants). POSCO — steelmaker, major coal consumer. Samsung, SK Group, Hyundai — major conglomerates with growing RE100 commitments.
MOTIE — energy and industry ministry. K-ETS — Korea Emissions Trading Scheme (launched 2015, covers ~70% of national emissies). KPX (한국전력거래소) — electricity market operator.

국회 (National Assembly) — unicameral, 300 members. Contact through assembly.go.kr. South Korea is a presidential republic with competitive elections. G20 member, OECD member, Powering Past Coal Alliance member (joined 2021).
